title: 'Hold Rollout, Furnish Details': Govt Notice to Meta Over WhatsApp Username Feat...
description: The Indian government has issued a notice to Meta regarding the new username feature on WhatsApp, demanding clarification within three days and halting its rollout until consultations are complete.
content: The Centre, on Wednesday, issued notice to Meta over the rollout of a new username feature on WhatsApp in India, sources said. The government directed Meta to furnish a detailed explanation on username feature within 3 days and asked the company not to roll out the feature until consultation on issue is over.The government is examining the legal framework and provisions in the law, as it scrutinises WhatsApp's proposed username feature, over fraud and impersonation concerns, according to sources.The notice to Meta has been sent to seek full details about the features, questioning its implications and the company's plans. Law enforcement agencies may also examine the issue, an official said.The government, as the statutory authority, will have to satisfy itself that the feature does not pose risks, given the legitimate concerns surrounding it, a source said, adding that the Meta-owned platform's latest announcement raises serious concerns.Sources said officials will examine whether there are legal provisions to restrict the feature.If WhatsApp's response is found to be unsatisfactory, the government may seek to prevent its rollout, they added."They cannot go ahead, unless they can assure and convince," the sources said, adding that WhatsApp, on its part, has indicated that this is a privacy tool.An email sent to WhatsApp did not elicit a response.   https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QplM_hYZqewWhat Govt Fears Government sources said that the feature could allow users to adopt usernames resembling those of legitimate agencies, organisations or individuals, potentially enabling impersonation and fraud. This could, in turn, have adverse implications for public safety and society.The government will not compromise on national security or public safety, they asserted.What Is WhatsApp's New Username Feature Meta-owned messaging platform WhatsApp announced the introduction of usernames, a feature that will allow users to communicate without sharing their phone numbers.The company has started early reservations for usernames, which will be officially rolled out later this year. WhatsApp has around 500 million users in India, a significant market for the platform."Starting this week, you can reserve a username to use later this year when we launch this feature," WhatsApp said in a blog post.According to the messaging platform, the move is aimed at enhancing user privacy, particularly in group chats or when connecting with new acquaintances by eliminating the need to exchange phone numbers.However, several startup founders, cybersecurity professionals and technology experts have voiced concerns over the proposed feature on X, arguing that usernames resembling those of businesses, government agencies or public figures could be exploited for impersonation and financial scams if adequate safeguards are not put in place.Paytm founder and CEO Vijay Shekhar Sharma has warned that lookalike usernames could become a major vector for impersonation and scams if not properly protected."Soon you will have a verified username on WhatsApp, and then unverified similar-sounding usernames…. which in turn will…," he posted on X.Jasveer Singh, co-founder and CEO of KnotDating, also flagged risks and, in a social media post, wrote: "Privacy matters. So does accountability".On social media, people are raising questions on how the platform would verify identities and prevent misuse of prominent names.Experts believe that the feature may create confusion by making it easier for fraudsters or scamsters to appear legitimate, by grabbing usernames that closely resemble bona fide brands or institutions.Notably, WhatsApp recently got an Indian face at the helm, with tech giant Meta investing Rs 8,550 crore (about USD 900 million) in the Indian fintech firm CRED, and appointing founder Kunal Shah as the new global head of the popular messaging platform.With inputs from PTI

title: A global fuel twist: Ukraine strikes force Russia to import gasoline from India
A space history mystery: What happened to the Viking arm used 50 years ago?
description: A timely tale about a 50-year-old robotic arm...
content:
Michael Collins looked down at his watch.
The Apollo 11 astronaut had already beaten the original schedule for the opening of the National Air and Space Museum by three days, but no one would remember that if these final 36 minutes didn't go perfectly.
President Gerald Ford and Vice President Nelson Rockefeller took 35 seconds to find their seats on the red, white, and blue bunting-lined outdoor stage. The flyover by the Thunderbirds was quick enough. At any other event, it would have been the only time-dependent concern of the day.Read full article

title: LINK Spacecraft Set for Mission to Boost NASA’s Swift Observatory
description: A first-of-its-kind mission to raise the orbit of NASA’s Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory is poised for launch no earlier than Thursday, July 2, 5:09 a.m. EDT (9:09 p.m. UTC+12), from Kwajalein Atoll, part of the Republic of the Marshall Islands in the South Pacific Ocean. A robotic servicing spacecraft called LINK, built by Katalyst Space, will blast […]
content:
A Katalyst engineer runs tests on LINK while the satellite is inside the Pegasus XL rocket attached to the Stargazer aircraft at NASA’s Wallops Flight Facility.NASA/Ron Beard


A first-of-its-kind mission to raise the orbit of NASA’s Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory is poised for launch no earlier than Thursday, July 2, 5:09 a.m. EDT (9:09 p.m. UTC+12), from Kwajalein Atoll, part of the Republic of the Marshall Islands in the South Pacific Ocean. A robotic servicing spacecraft called LINK, built by Katalyst Space, will blast into orbit on a Northrop Grumman Pegasus XL rocket attached to the belly of the company’s Stargazer aircraft, shown here in this photograph from the evening of Tuesday, June 16, 2026. 



After launch, LINK will attempt to rendezvous with, grapple, and slowly raise Swift’s altitude over several months, preventing it from re-entering Earth’s atmosphere later this year. If this daring mission is successful, it will be the first time a commercial robotic mission has captured a NASA spacecraft that is both uncrewed and not originally designed to be serviced in space.



Follow the Swift blog to learn more about the mission.



Image credit: NASA/Ron Beard

title: ‘वैभव सूर्यवंशी को पहले मैच में मौका नहीं देंगे’, पूर्व कप्तान का प्लेइंग 11 पर बड़ा फैसला
description:
खेल डेस्क: भारत और इंग्लैंड के बीच टी20 सीरीज का पहला मुकाबला बुधवार को चेस्टर-ले-स्ट्रीट के रिवरसाइड ग्राउंड में खेला जाएगा। मैच से पहले सबसे बड़ी चर्चा भारतीय टीम की प्लेइंग इलेवन को लेकर हो रही है। इंग्लैंड ने अपनी टीम का ऐलान कर दिया है, जबकि भारत की अंतिम एकादश का फैसला कप्तान श्रेयस.
The post ‘वैभव सूर्यवंशी को पहले मैच में मौका नहीं देंगे’, पूर्व कप्तान का प्लेइंग 11 पर बड़ा फैसला appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
खेल डेस्क: भारत और इंग्लैंड के बीच टी20 सीरीज का पहला मुकाबला बुधवार को चेस्टर-ले-स्ट्रीट के रिवरसाइड ग्राउंड में खेला जाएगा। मैच से पहले सबसे बड़ी चर्चा भारतीय टीम की प्लेइंग इलेवन को लेकर हो रही है। इंग्लैंड ने अपनी टीम का ऐलान कर दिया है, जबकि भारत की अंतिम एकादश का फैसला कप्तान श्रेयस अय्यर टॉस के समय करेंगे। इस बीच भारत के पूर्व कप्तान और 1983 विश्व कप विजेता कृष्णमाचारी श्रीकांत ने अपनी पसंदीदा प्लेइंग इलेवन चुनी है। उन्होंने साफ कहा कि वह युवा बल्लेबाज वैभव सूर्यवंशी को पहले मैच में मौका नहीं देंगे।
श्रीकांत ने चुनी अपनी प्लेइंग इलेवन
श्रीकांत ने ओपनिंग के लिए अभिषेक शर्मा और संजू सैमसन को चुना है। तीसरे नंबर पर ईशान किशन, चौथे स्थान पर कप्तान श्रेयस अय्यर, जबकि तिलक वर्मा और शिवम दुबे को मध्यक्रम में जगह दी है। ऑलराउंडर के रूप में अक्षर पटेल को शामिल किया गया है। गेंदबाजी में वरुण चक्रवर्ती के साथ तेज गेंदबाज हर्षित राणा, प्रिंस यादव और अर्शदीप सिंह को मौका दिया गया है।
वैभव को आयरलैंड दौरे पर मिलना चाहिए था मौका
श्रीकांत का मानना है कि 15 वर्षीय वैभव सूर्यवंशी को आयरलैंड के खिलाफ टी20 सीरीज में डेब्यू का मौका मिलना चाहिए था। उन्होंने कहा कि पहले मैच में अभिषेक शर्मा ने शानदार अर्धशतक लगाया था, इसलिए दूसरे मैच में उन्हें आराम देकर वैभव को आजमाया जा सकता था।
उन्होंने कहा कि अभिषेक टीम के नियमित खिलाड़ी हैं और उनकी जगह सुरक्षित है। ऐसे में वैभव को मौका मिलता तो वह अंतरराष्ट्रीय क्रिकेट का अनुभव हासिल कर सकते थे। श्रीकांत ने यह भी कहा कि आईपीएल 2026 में वैभव ने कठिन परिस्थितियों में शानदार बल्लेबाजी की थी और वह आयरलैंड के खिलाफ टीम के लिए मैच जिताने की क्षमता रखते थे।
इंग्लैंड के खिलाफ बदलाव के पक्ष में नहीं
हालांकि, श्रीकांत का कहना है कि अब इंग्लैंड जैसी मजबूत टीम के खिलाफ पहले दो टी20 मैचों में ओपनिंग जोड़ी में बदलाव करना सही नहीं होगा। उनके अनुसार, जब वैभव को आयरलैंड के खिलाफ मौका नहीं मिला, तो अब सीरीज की शुरुआत में उन्हें खिलाना उचित नहीं होगा। उन्होंने कहा कि पहले दो मैचों में भारत को अभिषेक शर्मा और संजू सैमसन की ओपनिंग जोड़ी के साथ ही उतरना चाहिए। वैभव सूर्यवंशी को अपने अंतरराष्ट्रीय डेब्यू के लिए अभी थोड़ा और इंतजार करना पड़ सकता है
The post ‘वैभव सूर्यवंशी को पहले मैच में मौका नहीं देंगे’, पूर्व कप्तान का प्लेइंग 11 पर बड़ा फैसला appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Sunil Bharti Mittal, Founder and Chairman of Bharti Enterprises, receives 2026 Leadership Award at USISPF Leadership Summit
description: USISPF conferred the 2026 Leadership Award on Bharti Enterprises Founder and Chairman Sunil Bharti Mittal in recognition of his contribution to transforming India's telecommunications sector and advancing economic ties between India and North America.
content: Bharti Enterprises Founder and Chairman Sunil Bharti Mittal was honoured with the 2026 Leadership Award at the IX Leadership Summit of the US-India Strategic Partnership Forum (USISPF). USISPF conferred the 2026 Leadership Award on Mittal in recognition of his contribution to transforming India's telecommunications sector and advancing economic ties between India and North America.The event celebrated the US-India commercial partnership ahead of America's 250th Independence Day, bringing together government officials and industry leaders from both countries.At the summit, Mittal expressed optimism over the ongoing India-US trade negotiations, saying he hopes the two countries will conclude a long-awaited trade agreement within the next few weeks.The forum honoured three global business leaders during its IX Leadership Summit for their contributions to strengthening the India-US commercial partnership.Besides Mittal, USISPF presented the 2026 Leadership Award to V. Prem Watsa, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Fairfax Financial, and Christopher T. Calio, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of RTX Corporation, for their leadership and contributions to strengthening the India-US economic corridor.In a video message played during the event, Mittal thanked USISPF for the recognition and stressed the growing strategic alignment between the two countries.Mittal directly addressed United States Secretary of Commerce Howard Lutnick and underscored the importance of the proposed trade pact for industry. "I'm hoping Secretary Lutnick that if not in days, but in a few weeks, that India and the US will have a trade deal that we in the industry have been looking forward to," Mittal said.Highlighting the broader strategic relationship between New Delhi and Washington, Mittal described the nearly five-million-strong Indian diaspora in the United States as a key pillar of bilateral cooperation."Indian diaspora of nearly five million people, largest anywhere in the world, has a beautiful bridge between India and US, helping the strategic relationship develop between the two nations, be that trade, defence, or indeed higher technologies," he said.Praising the forum's efforts in deepening economic engagement, Mittal also referred to the celebrations marking 250 years of American independence."How much I wish that I would have been amongst you today on this very special occasion of USISPF holding this very special day celebrating 250 years of US freedom," he said."I personally believe that the work that USISPF has been doing under Mukesh and John should be truly cherished and celebrated. Today they honor some of us with a very special leadership award. And I also take this occasion of congratulating Chris and Prem, who are my fellow awardees today," Mittal added.(With inputs from ANI)

title: System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian says “fuck you” to Netanyahu regime for “using our [Armenian] history, our genocide, our pain to their political advantage”
description:
Israel’s Prime Minister said his country had “fulfilled a moral duty by recognising the historical truth, and rejecting attempts to deny” that the killings in WWI were a genocide
The post System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian says “fuck you” to Netanyahu regime for “using our [Armenian] history, our genocide, our pain to their political advantage” appeared first on NME.
content:
System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian has hit out at the Israeli government, accusing them of “using” Armenian history and their “genocide and pain” to their “political advantage”.

READ MORE: System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian: “We are not living in a just world” 

The frontman is of Armenian descent and all four of his grandparents were survivors of the 1915 genocide that took place during World War I, and led to the deaths of between 664,000 and 1.2 million Armenians, according to United States Holocaust Memorial Museum.
Tankian and the band have regularly shed light on the mass killings of Armenians under the Ottoman Empire between 1915 and 1916, and even thanked former President Joe Biden for officially recognising the genocide in 2021 – a move that other American leaders often shied away from over concerns about potentially of straining the nation’s ties with Turkey.
According to EuroNews, Israel has long resisted calls to recognise it as a genocide due to its relations to Turkey. Now, amid weakening relations with Turkey over the humanitarian crisis in Gaza, Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has now officially recognised the killings WWI as a genocide, and said his country had “fulfilled a moral duty by recognising the historical truth, and rejecting attempts to deny it”.

ראש ממשלת ארמניה ניקול פשיניאן (@NikolPashinyan) עוקץ את ישראל על רקע הכרת הממשלה ברצח העם הארמני. "אנחנו סבורים כי לטובתה של רפובליקת ארמניה לא נכון להיות מעורבת בהפיכת סוגיית רצח העם הארמני לכלי פוליטי", אומר פשיניאן #Israel #Türkiye #Armenia pic.twitter.com/TvwAT3q2RY
— Dean Shmuel Elmas (@ElmasDean) June 30, 2026

The recognition has been met with hostility in Armenia, and Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan has distanced himself from Netanyahu’s comments – saying that he is wanting to avoid the “political weaponisation” of the subject.
“We believe that not entering into the issue of the weaponization of the Armenian Genocide is in the interests of the Republic of Armenia. Therefore, we do not see any need for a response,” he told reporters when asked about the Israeli decision (via The Times Of Israel).
Tankian also acknowledged the comments from Netanyahu, and criticised the Israeli Prime Minister as “using” the massacre to “their political advantage”.
“For many years, Israel’s government used AIPAC [American Israel Public Affairs Committee] to lobby the US Congress to not recognise the Armenian genocide, to prevent Congress from recognising the Armenian genocide, due to their relationship with Turkey, their intelligence sharing with Turkey, et cetera,” the singer alleged on Instagram stories.

BREAKING: System Of A Down's Serj Tankian blasts Netanyahu's government, saying "Fuck you!" for using the Armenian Genocide for political advantage. pic.twitter.com/XilFyFaBbA
— Kegham Balian (@kbalian90) June 29, 2026

“Today, the Netanyahu cabinet decided to recognise the Armenian genocide of 1915 — a genocide that led Hitler thinking that he could do what he could do to the Jews in the 1930s and 1940s,” he continued.
“The fact that this government is already committing genocide in Gaza and Lebanon decided to recognise the genocide of my grandparents is the worst fucking thing that they could have done to Armenians — by using our history, our genocide, our pain to their political advantage,” Tankian said, before concluding: “Fuck you”.
Tankian has long strived to raise awareness for the genocide in Armenia during the First World War, and wrote about how that moment in history affected his family in his autobiography, Down With The System.
“I’ve inherited his legacy in a way,” he told NME, discussing the memoir in 2024. He also added that he wanted his grandfather – who was affected by the conflict – to know that his band were “spreading awareness about [his] story, the genocide, and the importance for proper recognition of history” in their music.
The metal icon also condemned Israel’s actions in Gaza in that NME interview too, weighing in on the movement to boycott companies with ties to Israel.

“It’s important for the youth to raise their voice, because we are not living in a just world,” Tankian said. “I think in some cases, pure activism is taken hostage by certain fringe elements of society, including in the US – certain anti-Semites who have gotten into that world. However, I think the majority of the activists and their intentions are pure, and I think what they’re doing is important.”
He continued: “In terms of the Hamas invasion of Israel, I want to say that was obviously a terrorist act and they are war criminals and deserve to be punished. But, the Netanyahu government’s response is also – as we can see with the number of civilians that have died – a war crime.”
System Of A Down bandmate Daron Malakian spoke to NME about whether he saw any “parallels between the Armenian genocide and the war in Gaza” . “When it comes to that, I don’t know,” he replied. “I don’t like to see Palestinians die, I don’t like to see Jews die, I don’t like to see Christians die. I don’t like to see anybody die.”
“I try not to get too preachy because there are always two sides to certain things,” he added. “I’m just a guy who lives a very comfortable life. I’m blessed, I play in one of the biggest bands in the world… I’m not going to sit here and tell people what is right and wrong while I sit on top of my house that is on top of a hill.”
System Of A Down are currently on their 2026 UK and European stadium tour with support from Queens Of The Stone Age, which kicked off in Sweden on Monday (June 29). They will be playing in France, Italy and Germany later this month, as well as two nights at Tottenham Hotspur stadium in London.
Ahead of the show in Sweden, System Of A Down confirmed that they would be launching pop-up shops with exclusive merch, and Tankian said he and his bandmates are currently “having the best time of [their] lives as a band”.
They dropped their first new music in 15 years back in 2020, after going on hiatus from 2006 to 2010. However, they are yet to record a full-length follow-up to their 2005 albums ‘Mezmerize’ and ‘Hypnotize’.
The post System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian says “fuck you” to Netanyahu regime for “using our [Armenian] history, our genocide, our pain to their political advantage” appeared first on NME.

title: ఎయిడ్స్ తో ప్రముఖ నటి మృతి…షాక్ లో చిత్రసీమ
description: Aids : హాలీవుడ్ చలనచిత్ర పరిశ్రమలో తీవ్ర విషాదం చోటుచేసుకుంది. ప్రముఖ అమెరికన్ నటి, మాజీ చైల్డ్ ఆర్టిస్ట్ డేవీ చేస్ (35) లాస్ ఏంజిల్స్‌లోని ఒక...
content:
Aids : హాలీవుడ్ చలనచిత్ర పరిశ్రమలో తీవ్ర విషాదం చోటుచేసుకుంది. ప్రముఖ అమెరికన్ నటి, మాజీ చైల్డ్ ఆర్టిస్ట్ డేవీ చేస్ (35) లాస్ ఏంజిల్స్‌లోని ఒక ఆసుపత్రిలో కన్నుమూశారు. జూన్ 16న సంభవించిన ఆమె మరణానికి గల కారణాలను విశ్లేషిస్తూ లాస్ ఏంజిల్స్ కౌంటీ మెడికల్ ఎగ్జామినర్ తాజాగా విడుదల చేసిన నివేదిక పరిశ్రమ వర్గాలను తీవ్ర దిగ్భ్రాంతికి గురిచేసింది. డేవీ చేస్ ప్రమాదకరమైన ఎయిడ్స్ (AIDS) వ్యాధి బారిన పడి, దాని తీవ్రత వల్ల తలెత్తిన మెనింజైటిస్, బ్లడ్ ఇన్ఫెక్షన్ (సెప్సిస్) వంటి ఆరోగ్య సమస్యలతో మరణించినట్లు వైద్య నివేదికలో అధికారికంగా నిర్ధారించారు. కేవలం 35 ఏళ్ల ప్రాయంలోనే ఒకప్పటి స్టార్ నటి ఇలా అనారోగ్యంతో తనువు చాలించడం హాలీవుడ్‌ వ్యాప్తంగా తీవ్ర సంచలనంగా మారింది.



Read Also : కొడుకు మృతదేహంలో కీలక అవయవాలు లేవు.. వెనెజువెలాలో ఏం జరిగింది?











డ్రగ్స్ వ్యసనం మరియు హోమ్‌లెస్ జీవితం



ఏడేళ్ల చిన్న వయసులోనే బాలనటిగా హాలీవుడ్ ఇండస్ట్రీలోకి అడుగుపెట్టిన డేవీ చేస్.. 2002లో వచ్చిన ప్రపంచ ప్రసిద్ధ హర్రర్ చిత్రం ‘ది రింగ్’ (The Ring) లో సమారా మోర్గాన్ పాత్రతో అంతర్జాతీయంగా గుర్తింపు తెచ్చుకున్నారు. అలాగే డిస్నీ యానిమేటెడ్ చిత్రం ‘లిలో & స్టిట్చ్’ (Lilo & Stitch) లో లిలో పాత్రకు వాయిస్ ఓవర్ ఇచ్చి అవార్డులను గెలుచుకున్నారు. అయితే, చిన్ననాటి విజయాల తర్వాత ఆమె జీవితం క్రమంగా అంధకారంలోకి కూరుకుపోయింది. ఆమె తండ్రి తెలిపిన వివరాల ప్రకారం, డేవీ చేస్ తన 13 ఏళ్ల వయసులోనే డ్రగ్స్ మహమ్మారికి (Polysubstance use) బానిసయ్యారు. జీవితం చివరి దశలో కుటుంబానికి దూరమై, తీవ్రమైన పేదరికం, నిరాశ్రయత (Homelessness) అనుభవిస్తూ లాస్ ఏంజిల్స్ వీధుల్లో గడిపినట్లు సమాచారం. తొలుత ఆమె కేవలం బ్లడ్ ఇన్‌ఫెక్షన్‌తోనే చనిపోయిందని భావించినప్పటికీ, అంతర్లీనంగా ఉన్న ఎయిడ్స్ వ్యాధే ఆమె మరణానికి ప్రధాన కారణమని తేలడంతో చిత్రసీమ దిగ్భ్రాంతి వ్యక్తం చేస్తోంది.

title: ୧୦ ଦଫା ଦାବି ନେଇ ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ ଧର୍ମଘଟ, ସରକାର ଆମ ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ନ କଲେ…
description:
କେସିଙ୍ଗା,୧ା୭(ତୁମେଶ୍ୱର ସାହୁ): ଜୁଲାଇ ୧ରେ ଡାକ୍ତର ଦିବସରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ମେଡିକାଲ ସର୍ଭିସ ଆସୋସିଏଶନର ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ କ୍ରମେ କେସିଙ୍ଗା ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟକେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟବନ୍ଦ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ବୁଧବାରଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରାଯାଇଛି। ୧୦ଦଫା ଦାବ ନେଇ ଧର୍ମଘଟ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଗତ ୬ ମାସ ତଳେ କେବଳ ଦିନକୁ ୧ ଘଣ୍ଟା କାମବନ୍ଦ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରି ଥିବାରୁ ଡାକ୍ତର ତାଙ୍କର ୧୦ ଦଫା ନ୍ୟାଯ୍ୟ ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ହୋଇ ନ ଥିଲା। ତେଣୁ ବୁଧବାର ପୁଣି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ କଲମ ଛାଡ଼ […]
The post ୧୦ ଦଫା ଦାବି ନେଇ ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ ଧର୍ମଘଟ, ସରକାର ଆମ ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ନ କଲେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
କେସିଙ୍ଗା,୧ା୭(ତୁମେଶ୍ୱର ସାହୁ): ଜୁଲାଇ ୧ରେ ଡାକ୍ତର ଦିବସରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ମେଡିକାଲ ସର୍ଭିସ ଆସୋସିଏଶନର ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ କ୍ରମେ କେସିଙ୍ଗା ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟକେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟବନ୍ଦ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ବୁଧବାରଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରାଯାଇଛି। ୧୦ଦଫା ଦାବ ନେଇ ଧର୍ମଘଟ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଗତ ୬ ମାସ ତଳେ କେବଳ ଦିନକୁ ୧ ଘଣ୍ଟା କାମବନ୍ଦ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରି ଥିବାରୁ ଡାକ୍ତର ତାଙ୍କର ୧୦ ଦଫା ନ୍ୟାଯ୍ୟ ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ହୋଇ ନ ଥିଲା। ତେଣୁ ବୁଧବାର ପୁଣି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ କଲମ ଛାଡ଼ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ବାଧ୍ୟ ହୋଇ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଗତ ଥର ଘଣ୍ଟାକ ପାଇଁ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରିଥିବାରୁ ରାଜ୍ୟ ସରକାର ଡାକ୍ତରମାନଙ୍କୁ ୩ ମାସର ସମୟ ମାଗି ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନକୁ ସେହି ସମୟରେ ଆପୋଷ ବୁଝାମଣାରେ ବନ୍ଦ କରି ଦେଇଥିଲେ। କିନ୍ତୁ ଆଜିକୁ ୩ ମାସ ବଦଳରେ ୬ ମାସ ପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ତାଙ୍କ ୧୦ ଦଫା
ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ନ ହେବାରୁ ପୁଣି ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନକୁ ଓହ୍ଲାଇଛନ୍ତି। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ମେଡିକାଲର ସମସ୍ତ ସେବା ବୁଧବାରଠାରୁ ଠପ୍‌ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଗରିବ ଲୋକେ ହଇରାଣ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି। ଗରିବ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଜରୁରୀକାଳୀନ ସେବା ପାଇଁ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ କେବଳ ବେସରକାରୀ ମେଡିକାଲ ହିଁ ସାହା ଭରସା। କେସିଙ୍ଗା ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟକେନ୍ଦ୍ରର ୭ ଜଣ ଡାକ୍ତର ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନରେ ସାମିଲ ହୋଇ ଭବାନୀପାଟଣା ଜିଲା ମୁଖ୍ୟାଳୟକୁ ଯାଇ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ସାମିଲ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି।
ଏ ସଂକ୍ରାନ୍ତରେ କେସିଙ୍ଗା ମେଡିକାଲର ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ଡା. ରବୀନ୍ଦ୍ରନାଥ ଖୁଣ୍ଟିଆଙ୍କୁ ପଚାରିବାରୁ ଆମର ୧୦ ଦାବି ରାଜ୍ୟ ସରକାର ପୂରଣ ନ କଲା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରିବୁ। ଅତି ଜରୁରୀ ପାଇଁ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ପାଇଁ ଜଣେ ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କୁ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଦିଆଯାଇଛି ବୋଲି ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଥିଲେ।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ୧୦ ଦଫା ଦାବି ନେଇ ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ ଧର୍ମଘଟ, ସରକାର ଆମ ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ନ କଲେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Bharti Airtel launches NBFC operations under Airtel Money after RBI nod
description: The launch follows the receipt of a formal Certificate of Registration from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), which was granted to the company earlier this year on February 13.
content: Bharti Airtel has officially stepped into the non-banking financial sector. The company announced that its arm, Airtel Money Limited, has commenced commercial operations as a Type-II Non-Deposit-accepting Non-Banking Financial Company (Investment and Credit Company).The telecom giant made the announcement through a regulatory exchange filing on Wednesday. The launch follows the receipt of a formal Certificate of Registration from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), which was granted to the company earlier this year on February 13.“…we are pleased to inform that Airtel Money Limited, a subsidiary of the Company, has commenced its commercial operations as a Type II Non-Deposit accepting Non-Banking Financial Company [Type II-NBFC-ND (ICC)] pursuant to its Certificate of Registration, issued by the Reserve Bank of India on February 13, 2026,” Bharti Airtel informed in an exchange filing.  Operating under the classification of a Type II-NBFC-ND (Investment and Credit Company), the transition permits Bharti Airtel's financial services arm to deliver structured financial services such as digital lending and credit solutions but is strictly barred from accepting public deposits.RBI nod to Bharti Airtel to oparate as Type II NBFC-NDEarlier in February this year, Bharti Airtel said that its subsidiary, Airtel Money, received a Certificate of Registration from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) to operate as a Type II Non-Deposit Accepting Non-Banking Financial Company [Type II-NBFC-ND (ICC)].The certificate was issued under Section 45-IA of the RBI Act, 1934. With the RBI's approval, Airtel Money was authorised to start the business of a non-banking financial institution without accepting public deposits, subject to the conditions prescribed by the central bank.Bharti Airtel Share Price Shares of Bharti Airtel today ended at Rs 1870.80, up Rs 18.75 or 1.01 per cent from the previous close of Rs 1,852.05, on the BSE.Bharti Airtel is a global communications solutions provider with over 600 million customers in 15 countries across India and Africa.

title: From Peddi to Vaazha 2: Regional blockbusters that rewrote India's box office story in first half of 2026
description: Regional films have emerged as the biggest growth driver of India's Rs 5,373 crore box office in 2026, led by Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam and Marathi blockbusters.
content: India's domestic box office hit Rs 5,373 crore in the first five months of 2026, up 12 percent from the same period last year. While Hindi cinema still commands the largest share at 43 percent, the story of the first half belongs squarely to regional films. Here is a full breakdown of the standout performers.Telugu Cinema: The Heavyweight AnchorTelugu films account for 17 percent of domestic collections in 2026, and two titles in particular have driven that number.Peddi (Ram Charan, released June 4) is the year's biggest Telugu earner so far, clocking Rs 238 crore net domestically by June and crossing Rs 400 crore worldwide. The sports-action drama defied even the high expectations attached to it and comfortably stands as the top Telugu grosser of 2026. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noatJVfA22UMana Shankara Vara Prasad Garu (Chiranjeevi, Nayanthara, Venkatesh; released January 12) was the Sankranti centrepiece and became Chiranjeevi's highest-grossing film of all time. The film is now the second highest-grossing Telugu film of 2026 and ranks among the five highest-grossing Indian films of the year. Worldwide collections are reported between Rs 300 crore and Rs 310 crore. Maa Inti Bangaaram (Samantha Ruth Prabhu) emerged as the year's defining sleeper hit. The film grossed Rs 59.62 crore in India and Rs 83 crore worldwide against a budget of just Rs 20 crore, making it nearly four times its cost and the biggest women-led Telugu hit on record. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B9d-wISnm8sTamil Cinema: Karuppu Breaks RecordsTamil films hold a 13 percent share of the domestic box office in 2026, with Suriya's Karuppu as the headline act. The film's worldwide gross is reported between Rs 304 crore and Rs 340 crore depending on the source, quickly surpassing the lifetime collections of Tamil classics like Singam 2. Directed by RJ Balaji, the action-devotional drama also released in Telugu as Veerabhadrudu and emerged as May's single highest-grossing film across all languages. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JpVl_-1YgIoMalayalam Cinema: Vaazha 2 Makes HistoryMalayalam films account for 10 percent of domestic collections and have delivered two of the year's most remarkable stories.Vaazha 2: Biopic of a Billion Bros (released April 2) became a phenomenon by any measure. The film has grossed over Rs 124 crore in Kerala alone, making it the highest-grossing film of all time in the state, and is the second highest-grossing Malayalam film of 2026 overall. Its worldwide lifetime collection stands at more than Rs 235 crore, produced on a budget of just Rs 10 crore. By day nine, the film had registered profits of 514 percent, making it the most profitable Indian film of 2026 at that point. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0ESCE9ExwyADrishyam 3 (Mohanlal) crossed Rs 100 crore domestically and Rs 239.82 crore worldwide, becoming one of the biggest Malayalam releases of the year and the fourth highest-grossing Malayalam film of all time at the time of its run. WikipediaMarathi Cinema: A Historic TurnaroundPerhaps the most striking story of the year belongs to Marathi cinema. Its share of the domestic box office has risen to 4 percent in 2026, up from 1 to 2 percent over the previous three years. Marathi films have collectively grossed more than Rs 220 crore in five months, more than double the Rs 96 crore collected across the entirety of 2025.Raja Shivaji stands at Rs 96.39 crore net domestically and Rs 117.97 crore worldwide. Nearly 27 percent of its collections came from its Hindi-dubbed version. Together with Deool Band 2, the two May releases account for 77 percent of Marathi cinema's entire 2026 box office tally, and the industry is now on track to surpass its all-time record of Rs 268 crore, set in 2022. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6Q3P8yYhGkgThe Bigger PictureThe top 10 highest-grossing Indian films of 2026 so far include three Hindi films, two Telugu, two Malayalam, and one each from Tamil, Marathi and international cinema. Six months in, regional cinema is no longer a supporting act. It is headlining.

title: Cabinet approves Rs 14,115 crore infra projects; 8.1-km Dwarka Tunnel for Delhi & Kanpur–Kabrai Highway for UP
description: Cabinet decision today: The decision, announced by Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw during a cabinet briefing, focuses heavily on decongesting the national capital and enhancing high-speed connectivity in Uttar Pradesh.
content: In a major boost to infrastructure in Delhi and Uttar Pradesh, the Union Cabinet on Wednesday approved two massive highway and tunnel projects totalling Rs 14,115 crore. The decision, announced by Information and Broadcasting Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw during a cabinet briefing, focuses heavily on decongesting the national capital and enhancing high-speed connectivity in Uttar Pradesh.Cabinet decision todayThe Union Cabinet approved a 6-lane Dwarka tunnel in Delhi, with an expenditure of 6,970 crore, and a 4-lane access-controlled highway connecting highway from Kanpur to Kabrai in Uttar Pradesh at an estimated cost of Rs 7,145 crore.6-lane Dwarka tunnel in Delhi - Rs 6,970 crore4-lane access controlled highway from Kanpur to Kabrai in Uttar Pradesh - Rs 7,145 croreRelief for Delhi-NCR: 6-lane Dwarka tunnel at Rs 6,970 crore The construction of a 6-lane road tunnel for NH-148AE, connecting Dwarka Expressway with Nelson Mandela Marg, Vasant Kunj in Delhi, has been approved, Union Minister Vaishnaw said at the briefing.The 8.1-km road tunnel for NH-148AE will be constructed through hybrid annuity mode (HAM), and the project is expected to be completed in five years with a total capital cost of Rs 6,969.67 crore, the Union Minister stated. The project will provide faster connectivity between West and South Delhi, connecting UER 2/Dwarka Expressway to Vasant Kunj in South Delhi. It will ease traffic from Gurugram, Dwarka, IGI Airport, and West Delhi towards South Delhi, according to an official statement.A 1.98-km section of the tunnel will pass beneath the Southern Ridge Forest.The statement further said that the underground twin-tube tunnel minimises surface disruption, preserving the ridge.The National Highway Authority of India (NHAI) is also proposing an elevated corridor between AIIMS and Mahipalpur.This link will connect the tunnel to the Barapullah elevated road, thereby connecting West Delhi, South Delhi with East Delhi, Ghaziabad and Noida, it added.The tunnel, to be constructed through a tunnel boring machine (TBM), will start from Shivmurti interchange and terminate before the intersection of Nelson Mandela Marg and Mahipalpur Chhatarpur Road.To mitigate congestion at this intersection, an elevated 1.8-km road is proposed along the Nelson Mandela Marg. An additional flyover from Chhatarpur towards Mahipalpur is also proposed along the existing flyover, the statement said.To facilitate the right-turning traffic towards Chhatarpur, an elevated U-turn is also proposed, the statement added.The length of the main carriageway is 6.3 Km. Considering the proposed flyover and elevated U-turn along Mahipalpur-Chhatarpur Road, the total project length is 8.100 km.The statement said it has been estimated that the development of each lane-kilometer of a National Highway generates an average of 264 person-days/day of direct employment and average 55 person-days/ day of indirect employment.Therefore, the project will generate close to 7.54 lakh person-days of direct employment and 9.80 lakh person-days of indirect employment, it added.Project Length: 8.1 kmProject Cost: Rs 6,969.67 croreThe project will provide faster connectivity between West Delhi and South Delhi by linking UER-2/Dwarka Expressway with Vasant KunjIt will benefit commuters travelling from Gurugram, Dwarka, IGI Airport, and West Delhi to South DelhiThe project also includes a proposed elevated corridor between AIIMS and Mahipalpur, connecting the tunnel to Barapullah Elevated RoadBenefitsExisting road connecting Mahipalpur and Vasant Kunj is saturated, with negligible scope for wideningWill decongest the existing Dhaula Kuan-IGI Airport/ Mahipalpur, Chattarpur-Mahipalpur/ IGI Airport and Rangpuri bottlenecksWill benefit traffic from Gurugram, Dwarka, IGI Airport, and West Delhi towards South DelhiAbout 37 thousand Passenger Car Units per day will get benefitWill provide connectivity to 6 PM Gati Shakti economic nodes and 4 logistics nodes4-lane access controlled highway from Kanpur to KabraiBesides, Vaishnaw said the Cabinet also gave its nod for the construction of the 117.7-km 4/6-lane access-controlled Kanpur–Kabrai section of NH-34 in Uttar Pradesh under BOT (Toll) Mode. The estimated cost of the project is Rs 7,145.14 crore.According to an official statement, the highway project will form a key segment of the Bhopal–Kanpur Economic Corridor under the National Highways (O) Programme.The project will provide seamless, high-speed connectivity between Kanpur and Kabrai, while strengthening onward connectivity to Sagar, Bhopal and other parts of Madhya Pradesh, thereby creating a modern access-controlled economic corridor linking the industrial and commercial centres of Uttar Pradesh with mineral-rich, manufacturing and agricultural regions of Madhya Pradesh, the statement added.Designed for operating speeds of 80–100 kmph, the corridor will reduce travel time between Kanpur and Kabrai from 3.5 hours to 1.5 hours (58 per cent), while improving road safety, reducing vehicle operating costs and facilitating efficient movement of passenger and freight traffic, it said. The project will also provide strategic connectivity with NH-34, NH-35, the Bundelkhand Expressway, Kanpur Ring Road, and State Highways SH-46, SH-91, SH-10B and SH-42, thereby strengthening integration with the regional highway network.The highway project will form a key segment of the Bhopal–Kanpur Economic Corridor under the National Highways (O) Programme and will provide seamless, high-speed connectivity between Kanpur and Kabrai, while strengthening onward connectivity to Sagar, Bhopal and other parts of Madhya Pradesh, thereby creating a modern access-controlled economic corridor linking the industrial and commercial centres of Uttar Pradesh with mineral-rich, manufacturing and agricultural regions of Madhya Pradesh, it added.Designed for operating speeds of 80–100 kmph, the corridor will reduce travel time between Kanpur and Kabrai from 3.5 hours to 1.5 hours (58 per cent), while improving road safety, reducing vehicle operating costs and facilitating efficient movement of passenger and freight traffic, it added.The project will also provide strategic connectivity with NH-34, NH-35, the Bundelkhand Expressway, Kanpur Ring Road, and State Highways SH-46, SH-91, SH-10B and SH-42, thereby strengthening integration with the regional highway network.Aligned with the PM GatiShakti National Master Plan, the statement said, the project will improve connectivity to 16 Economic Nodes, including the Unnao, Banther, Pankhi, Rania, Jainpur, Rooma, Chakeri, Sumerpur and Bhuragarh Industrial Areas, Trans Ganga Integrated Township, Growth Centre Jaipur, Kanpur Nagar Node and Bengal Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd.It will also strengthen connectivity to 9 Social Nodes -- Fatehpur, Mahoba, Kanpur Zoological Park, Buddha Park, JK Temple & Garden, Radha Krishna Temple, Siddheshwar Mahadev Temple, Gopeshwar Mandir and Mahoba Tourist Place.The project will also cover 10 Logistics Nodes, including Kanpur, Ghatampur, Hamirpur, Mahoba, Kabrai, Bharwa Sumerpur and Banda Railway Stations, together with Kanpur, Chakeri and Khajuraho Airports, it said.According to the statement, the project is expected to generate approximately 11,188 direct and 13,985 indirect person-days of employment per lane per km during construction and is projected to carry an Annual Average Daily Traffic (AADT) of about 18,069 Passenger Car Units (PCUs) by FY 2028.The proposed project will thus generate close to 1.2 crore person-days of direct employment and indirect employment, it said.Project Capital Cost: Rs 7,145.14 croreIt will provide seamless, high-speed connectivity between Kanpur and Kabrai, with improved access to Sagar, Bhopal, and other parts of Madhya PradeshThe corridor will reduce travel time between Kanpur and Kabrai from 3.5 hours to 1.5 hoursIt will further strengthen connectivity to the Kabrai mining belt, facilitating the movement of minerals, industrial goods, construction materials, and agricultural produceThe project will improve connectivity to 16 Economic Nodes & 9 Social Nodes

title: Indian sailor’s body returns from Venezuela with organs missing; family demands probe
विकास करार रद्द झाल्यास मुद्रांक शुल्क परतावा बंद
description: मुंबई | प्रतिनिधी Mumbai विकास करार रद्द, निरस्त किंवा समाप्त झाल्यास कोणत्याही परिस्थितीत मुद्रांक शुल्काचा परतावा किंवा सवलत दिली जाणार नाही, अशी तरतूद असलेली महाराष्ट्र मुद्रांक अधिनियम सुधारणा विधेयक महसूलमंत्री चंद्रशेखर बावनकुळे यांनी बुधवारी विधानसभेत सादर केले. राज्याच्या महसुलाचे संरक्षण करणे आणि कायद्यातील पळवाटांचा होणारा गैरवापर रोखणे हा या सुधारणेचा मुख्य उद्देश असल्याचे त्यांनी यावेळी […]
content:
मुंबई | प्रतिनिधी Mumbai



विकास करार रद्द, निरस्त किंवा समाप्त झाल्यास कोणत्याही परिस्थितीत मुद्रांक शुल्काचा परतावा किंवा सवलत दिली जाणार नाही, अशी तरतूद असलेली महाराष्ट्र मुद्रांक अधिनियम सुधारणा विधेयक महसूलमंत्री चंद्रशेखर बावनकुळे यांनी बुधवारी विधानसभेत सादर केले. राज्याच्या महसुलाचे संरक्षण करणे आणि कायद्यातील पळवाटांचा होणारा गैरवापर रोखणे हा या सुधारणेचा मुख्य उद्देश असल्याचे त्यांनी यावेळी स्पष्ट केले



विकास करारांच्या संदर्भात मोठ्या प्रमाणावर मुद्रांक शुल्क भरले जाते. तथापि, व्यावसायिक कारणांमुळे किंवा परस्पर मतभेदांमुळे हे करार पुढील टप्प्यावर रद्द, निरस्त किंवा समाप्त केले जातात. त्यानंतर भरलेल्या मुद्रांक शुल्काच्या परताव्यासाठी शासनाकडे अर्ज सादर केले जातात. अशा प्रकरणांमध्ये तथ्य पडताळणी करताना प्रशासकीय अडचणी निर्माण होतात आणि परताव्याचे अनेक दावे वाढतात, याकडे बावनकुळे यांनी लक्ष वेधले.



मुद्रांक शुल्क हा दस्ताच्या अंमलबजावणीवर आकारला जातो. कराराची प्रत्यक्ष अंमलबजावणी झाली किंवा नाही यावर तो अवलंबून नसतो. त्यामुळे करार रद्द झाला तरी अशा प्रकरणांमध्ये परतावा देणे महसुलीदृष्ट्या राज्यासाठी प्रतिकूल आणि नुकसानकारक ठरत होते. तसेच कायद्यातील सवलतींच्या तरतुदींचा गैरवापर होण्याची शक्यता निर्माण झाली होती, असे बावनकुळे म्हणाले.



तरतुदींमधील पळवाटा बंदमहाराष्ट्र मुद्रांक अधिनियमाच्या कलम ४७ अन्वये विशिष्ट प्रकरणांमध्ये मुद्रांक शुल्क परतावा/सवलत देण्याची तरतूद असून कलम ४८ (१) मध्ये त्यासाठीची कालमर्यादा नमूद आहे. सध्याच्या तरतुदींमध्ये काही विशिष्ट प्रकरणांकरिता परंतुकाद्वारे जी शिथिलता देण्यात आली होती, तिचा विकास करारांच्या बाबतीत गैरवापर रोखण्यासाठी हे कडक पाऊल उचलण्यात आले आहे. या सुधारणेमुळे रिअल इस्टेट क्षेत्रात आणि मुद्रांक शुल्क विभागात अधिक पारदर्शकता येईल, असा सरकारला विश्वास आहे.

title: Australian music industry writes a letter to government
description: Australian music bodies are strongly opposing the unauthorized use of their artists' work to train AI models. A coalition of industry groups has penned a letter to the government, demanding robust copyright protection and stricter measures against such exploitation. This action follows reports of numerous Australian musicians' creations being incorporated into AI datasets without consent or compensation, mirroring similar concerns raised by the UK music industry.

								NASA’s Webb Studies How Planet Survived Death of its Star							











Exoplanet WD 1856 b, shown in this artist’s concept, is a gas giant that orbits its star at a distance 50 times closer than Earth orbits the Sun. Observations by NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope determined the planet’s temperature and detected molecules in its atmosphere.


						Credits: 
						Artwork: NASA, ESA, CSA, Ralf Crawford (STScI)
					



NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope is giving us new insight into the far-future of solar systems like our own, as the agency continues to reveal the secrets of the universe and our place in it. Billions of years ago, a Sun-like star nearing the end of its life swelled tremendously in size to become a red giant before ejecting its outer layers, leaving a hot, remnant core known as a white dwarf. As a red giant, the star should have engulfed and destroyed any nearby planets. Yet astronomers have found a Jupiter-sized exoplanet orbiting the white dwarf every 34 hours at a separation of less than 2 million miles (3 million kilometers).
To solve the mystery of how this exoplanet survived, an international team of astronomers used NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope to watch the Jupiter-sized exoplanet WD 1856 b transit its host star, measuring the planet’s temperature and detecting molecules in its atmosphere. They found the planet is significantly warmer than expected and determined how it most likely reached its very tight orbit around the white dwarf star. The results are a window into the future of planets like Jupiter after the death of the Sun, billions of years into the future.
The results published Wednesday in the journal Nature.
WD 1856 b was discovered in 2020 by scientists using NASA’s TESS (Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite) and the retired Spitzer Space Telescope. It orbits the white dwarf WD 1856+534, which is located about 80 light-years from Earth. “The planet is about the size of Jupiter, but the white dwarf it orbits is the size of Earth, so the planet is seven times larger than its star,” said lead author Ryan MacDonald of the University of St. Andrews in the United Kingdom.
WD 1856 b orbits extremely close to its host star, a distance 50 times closer than Earth orbits the Sun. If WD 1856 b had originally been orbiting at that distance, it would have been obliterated while the star was a red giant. How did it survive the death of its host star and end up in its current position?
Image: Exoplanet WD 1856 b (Artist’s Concept)




Exoplanet WD 1856 b, shown in this artist’s concept, is a gas giant that orbits its star at a distance 50 times closer than Earth orbits the Sun. Observations by NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope determined the planet’s temperature and detected molecules in its atmosphere.
Artwork: NASA, ESA, CSA, Ralf Crawford (STScI)



How big, how hot
The new study used Webb to watch the planet passing in front of its star. This transit yielded unique information about the planet’s mass, which is between four and eleven times the mass of Jupiter.
The team also was able to determine the planet’s temperature. During the transit, light from the star was partly blocked, but infrared light was reduced less than other wavelengths. The difference was infrared light emitted by the planet from its own heat. The data indicated that the planet has a temperature of about 260 degrees Fahrenheit (126 degrees Celsius) — significantly hotter than it would be if its only source of heat was the light from the white dwarf. This puzzling discovery turned out to be the key fact that proved how the planet must have reached its current orbit.
Christopher O’Connor of Northwestern University in Illinois, a co-author on the paper, was responsible for tracing the temperature of the planet back in time. O’Connor said, “The big question is how WD 1856 b ended up where it is today, and there are two theories. One is that the planet was swallowed by the host star as it was dying, and managed to survive on the inside. The other is that migration took place due to the gravitational effect of other objects in the system. The white dwarf is part of a triple star system, and the companion stars could have influenced WD 1856 b’s orbit.”
The researchers realized that there was no source of energy present to generate that heat today, so it must be residual energy from an earlier time when the planet was heated. Using models of how sub-stellar objects like WD 1856 b cool down over time, coupled with the new data from Webb, the team was able to project its temperature back in time and deduce how long ago the heating must have happened. The timing is key to determining whether the heating was from being engulfed by the red giant or occurred during an inward migration
They concluded that the heating most likely happened between 3 and 5.5 billion years after the star became a white dwarf. In this scenario, the planet was on a wide orbit that kept it safe from the star during its destructive red giant phase, and only migrated to its present location later on. “As the planet moved inward, its interactions with the strong gravity of the white dwarf will have caused it to warm up considerably, and it has been cooling ever since,” said O’Connor.
Light from the star passing through the planet’s atmosphere also picked up information about its chemical composition. “We saw the telltale signatures of small cloud particles and hydrocarbons, most likely methane, which is the first time we have seen an atmosphere on a planet transiting a dead star,” said co-author Victoria Boehm of Cornell University. “We recently observed four more transits of WD 1856 b with Webb to take a deeper look into its atmospheric chemistry and can’t wait to see the results.”
Image: Exoplanet WD 1856 b (Transmission Spectrum)




NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope measured the constituents of exoplanet WD 1856 b as it passed in front of its star, finding signs of methane. WD 1856 b orbits a white dwarf star the size of Earth. As a result, the planet blocks more than half of the star’s light.
Illustration: NASA, ESA, CSA, Joseph Olmsted (STScI)



Solar system’s possible future
In approximately five billion years, the Sun will run out of hydrogen fuel in its core and swell up more than 100 times larger than it is now into a red giant star. It will then shed its outer layers and end its life as a white dwarf star. Mercury, Venus, and possibly the Earth will be destroyed by the red giant. However, the fate of the more distant planets, particularly the gas giants, is unclear. Finding and studying planets in orbit around the remnants of Sun-like stars after their death is a means of learning what might happen in our own solar system in the far future.
“We’re used to looking back in time when we use telescopes, but this is the first time we have been able to look forward to what might happen to the outer planets around the remnant of a Sun-like star,” said MacDonald. “It’s like using a time machine to peer into the distant future of our solar system.”
The James Webb Space Telescope is the world’s premier space science observatory. Webb is solving mysteries in our solar system, looking beyond to distant worlds around other stars, and probing the mysterious structures and origins of our universe and our place in it. Webb is an international program led by NASA with its partners, ESA (European Space Agency) and CSA (Canadian Space Agency).
To learn more about Webb, visit:
https://science.nasa.gov/webb

title: নগাঁৱত 'শিল্পকানন'ৰ উদ্যোগত আৰম্ভ শিশুনাট কৰ্মশালা
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, নগাঁওঃ "জ্ঞান লাভৰ বাবে কোনো সুকীয়া মঞ্চ নালাগে। বিভিন্ন মাধ্যম তথা উৎসৰ পৰা আমি জ্ঞান আহৰণ কৰিব পাৰোঁ। প্ৰকৃতি, চৰাই-চিৰিকতি তথা জীৱকুলেও আমাক শৃংখলিত হ'বলৈ শিকায়। সিও এক শিক্ষা। বিনিয়োগ অবিহনেও শিক্ষা লাভ কৰিব পাৰি, মাথো মনৰ দৃঢ়তা লাগে। শিল্প-সাহিত্যৰ সৈতে জড়িত হৈ থাকিলে আমাৰ মনবোৰ সতেজ আৰু প্ৰফুল্লিত হৈ থাকে। যাৰ জৰিয়েতে আমি পৃথিৱীখন সদায়েই চিকুণ দেখোঁ।"- এই মন্তব্য নগাঁৱৰ জ্যেষ্ঠ সাংবাদিক তথা নাট্য সমালোচক জ্যোতিপ্ৰসাদ বৰাৰ।
আজি নগাঁৱৰ আমোলাপট্টিৰ 'শিল্পকানন'ৰ কাৰ্যালয়ত এক শিশুনাট কৰ্মশালা উদ্বোধন কৰি এই মন্তব্য প্ৰদান কৰে ৰাষ্ট্ৰীয় সংবাদ প্ৰতিষ্ঠান এ এন আইৰ সাংবাদকৰ্মী গৰাকীয়ে। গ্ৰীষ্ম বন্ধৰ উপলক্ষে নগাঁৱৰ নাট্যচৰ্চাৰ অন্যতম প্ৰতিষ্ঠান শিল্পকাননে আজিৰে পৰা দহদিনীয়াকৈ অনুষ্ঠিত কৰিছে এক শিশুনাট কৰ্মশালা। সুস্মিতা শইকীয়া, চিৰঞ্জীৱ বাৎস্য, নীড় আবিদ খান, প্ৰাণজিৎ গোস্বামী, অশোক সিং আদিকে ধৰি কেইবাগৰাকীও অভিজ্ঞ প্ৰশিক্ষকে প্ৰশিক্ষণ প্ৰদান কৰিবলগীয়া এই কৰ্মশালাৰ সামৰণি পৰিব ১০ জুলাইত।
ইফালে, ইয়াৰ পিছতে প্ৰশিক্ষাৰ্থী সকলক লৈ মঞ্চস্থ হ'ব একাধিক নাট্যানুষ্ঠানৰ। ধৰ্মপ্ৰাণ মহিলা কললেশ্বৰী দেৱীয়ে বন্তি প্ৰজ্বলন কৰি আজিৰ উদ্বোধনী অনুষ্ঠানটিৰ প্ৰাণ সঞ্চাৰ কৰে। আজিৰ এই উদ্বোধনী অনুষ্ঠানত শিল্পকাননৰ ধনঞ্জয় বৰদলৈ, সোণমণি বেজবৰুৱা, বিনন্দ সুতৰ উপৰিও প্ৰশিক্ষাৰ্থীসকলৰ অভিভাৱক সকলো উপস্থিত থাকে।
উল্লেখ্য যে, ২০০৬ চনত জন্মলাভ কৰা শিল্পকাননে বিগত বিশ বছৰ ধৰি গ্ৰীষ্মকালীন শিশুনাট কৰ্মশালা অনুষ্ঠিত কৰি অহাৰ উপৰিও সময়ে সময়ে মননশীল নাট্যসন্ধিয়া অনুষ্ঠিত কৰি আহিছে।

title: ପାଟପୁର ଥାନା ପକ୍ଷରୁ ନିଆରା ପ୍ରୟାସ, ନିଶା ଦ୍ରବ୍ୟ ସେବନ ବିରୋଧରେ ନେଲେ ଶପଥ
description:
ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି,୧ା୭(ଅଶେଷ ନାଥ ମିଶ୍ର): ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ସାନଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ବ୍ଲକ ପାଟପୁର ଥାନା ଆମ ପୋଲିସ ସମିତି ପକ୍ଷରୁ ବୁଧବାର ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଅଭିଯାନ ଆନୁକୁଲ୍ୟରେ ସଚେତନତା ସଭା ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଥାନା ଏସ.ଆଇ ଶ୍ରୀନିବାସ ଦାସଙ୍କ ସଂଯୋଜନାରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ସଭାରେ ପାଟପୁର କଲେଜ ଅଧ୍ୟାପକ ଡ଼.କୈଳାସ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ସ୍ବାଇଁ ଅତିଥି ଭାବେ ଯୋଗଦେଇ ‘ ଆମ ସଂକଳ୍ପ ନିଶା ନୁହେଁ ଜୀବନ’ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ବିସ୍ତୃତ ଆଲୋଚନା କରିଥିଲେ । ଜନଜାତି ସମ୍ପ୍ରଦାୟ ବିଶେଷ କରି ଯୁବ ସମାଜକୁ […]
The post ପାଟପୁର ଥାନା ପକ୍ଷରୁ ନିଆରା ପ୍ରୟାସ, ନିଶା ଦ୍ରବ୍ୟ ସେବନ ବିରୋଧରେ ନେଲେ ଶପଥ  appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି,୧ା୭(ଅଶେଷ ନାଥ ମିଶ୍ର): ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ସାନଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି ବ୍ଲକ ପାଟପୁର ଥାନା ଆମ ପୋଲିସ ସମିତି ପକ୍ଷରୁ ବୁଧବାର ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଅଭିଯାନ ଆନୁକୁଲ୍ୟରେ ସଚେତନତା ସଭା ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଥାନା ଏସ.ଆଇ ଶ୍ରୀନିବାସ ଦାସଙ୍କ ସଂଯୋଜନାରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ସଭାରେ ପାଟପୁର କଲେଜ ଅଧ୍ୟାପକ ଡ଼.କୈଳାସ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ସ୍ବାଇଁ ଅତିଥି ଭାବେ ଯୋଗଦେଇ ‘ ଆମ ସଂକଳ୍ପ ନିଶା ନୁହେଁ ଜୀବନ’ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ବିସ୍ତୃତ ଆଲୋଚନା କରିଥିଲେ । ଜନଜାତି ସମ୍ପ୍ରଦାୟ ବିଶେଷ କରି ଯୁବ ସମାଜକୁ ନିଶାଦ୍ରବ୍ୟ ଓ ଅପମିଶ୍ରିତ ମାଦକଦ୍ରବ୍ୟ ସେବନରୁ ଦୂରେଇ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ସମାଜର ମୁଖ୍ୟସ୍ରୋତରେ ସାମିଲ କରିବା ଏହି ସଚେତନତା ଅଭିଯାନର ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ବୋଲି ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ।
ଅପମିଶ୍ରିତ ନିଶା ସେବନ ଦ୍ଵାରା ଲୋକେ ପଙ୍ଗୁ ହୋଇଯାଆନ୍ତି । ଯୁବ ସମାଜ ନିଶା ସେବନ ଦ୍ଵାରା ସେମାନଙ୍କ ବିକାଶ ଓ ଦେଶର ଅର୍ଥନୀତି ରେ ପ୍ରତିକୂଳ ପ୍ରଭାବ ପକାଇଥାଏ ।ତେଣୁ ସେମାନେ ନିଶା ସେବନ ଠାରୁ ଦୂରେଇ ରହିବା ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ବୋଲି ସଭାରେ ମତପ୍ରକାଶ ପାଇଥିଲା।
ବିଭିନ୍ନ ଗ୍ରାମାଞ୍ଚଳରୁ ଆସିଥିବା ବହୁ ସଂଖ୍ୟକ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ଏନେଇ ସଚେତନ କରାଯିବା ପରେ ସେମାନେ ନିଶା ସେବନ ବିରୋଧରେ ଶପଥପାଠ କରିଥିଲେ।  ଏହି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମରେ ଥାନା ଏସ.ଆଇ ସୋଲେମାନ ଭୁଁୟା, ଏଏସଆଇ ସୁଧିର ନାୟକ, ସନ୍ତୋଷ ମିଶ୍ର,ରମାକାନ୍ତ ଶବରଙ୍କ ସମେତ ସମସ୍ତ ପୋଲିସ କର୍ମଚାରୀ   ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ।
 

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ପାଟପୁର ଥାନା ପକ୍ଷରୁ ନିଆରା ପ୍ରୟାସ, ନିଶା ଦ୍ରବ୍ୟ ସେବନ ବିରୋଧରେ ନେଲେ ଶପଥ  appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: జులై 4న రేవంత్ ‘రాజకీయ కృతజ్ఞత’ సభ
description: Political Gratitude Meeting : తెలంగాణ ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఎ. రేవంత్ రెడ్డి తన సుదీర్ఘ రాజకీయ ప్రయాణంలో అత్యంత కీలకమైన మైలురాయిని స్మరించుకుంటూ జులై 4వ తేదీన...
content:
Political Gratitude Meeting : తెలంగాణ ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఎ. రేవంత్ రెడ్డి తన సుదీర్ఘ రాజకీయ ప్రయాణంలో అత్యంత కీలకమైన మైలురాయిని స్మరించుకుంటూ జులై 4వ తేదీన భారీ ‘రాజకీయ కృతజ్ఞత’ సభను నిర్వహించనున్నారు. స్థానిక సంస్థల ప్రతినిధి (ZPTC) స్థాయి నుంచి రాష్ట్ర ముఖ్యమంత్రి పీఠాన్ని అధిరోహించే వరకు సాగిన తన 20 ఏళ్ల రాజకీయ ప్రస్థానాన్ని పురస్కరించుకుని ఆయన ఈ నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్నారు. తన రాజకీయ ఎదుగుదలకూ, ప్రజా జీవితంలో తొలి విజయానికీ పునాది వేసిన ఉమ్మడి మహబూబ్‌నగర్ జిల్లాలోని మిడ్జిల్ మండల కేంద్రంలో ఈ బహిరంగ సభను ఏర్పాటు చేసి, తనకు అండగా నిలిచిన స్థానిక ప్రజలకు, ఓటర్లకు ఆయన స్వయంగా ధన్యవాదాలు తెలపనున్నారు. ముఖ్యమంత్రిగా బాధ్యతలు చేపట్టిన తర్వాత తన రాజకీయ జన్మభూమిలో నిర్వహిస్తున్న ఈ సభ కాంగ్రెస్ శ్రేణుల్లో మరియు స్థానిక దౌత్య వర్గాల్లో నూతనోత్తేజాన్ని నింపుతోంది.



Read Also : కవిత కొత్త పార్టీ ‘టీఆర్ఎస్’ పేరుపై సందిగ్ధత.. ఈసీకి భారీగా అభ్యంతరాలు!











అభివృద్ధి పనులు మరియు ఆత్మీయ సమ్మేళనం



మిడ్జిల్ పర్యటనలో భాగంగా ముఖ్యమంత్రి రేవంత్ రెడ్డి పలు అధికారిక, ఆధ్యాత్మిక కార్యక్రమాల్లో పాల్గొననున్నారు. సభకు ముందుగా మండల పరిధిలోని ప్రసిద్ధ పుణ్యక్షేత్రం ఊరుకొండ లక్ష్మీనరసింహస్వామి ఆలయాన్ని దర్శించుకుని ప్రత్యేక పూజలు నిర్వహిస్తారు. అనంతరం నియోజకవర్గ పరిధిలో పలు నూతన ప్రభుత్వ అభివృద్ధి పనులకు శంకుస్థాపనలు, పూర్తయిన ప్రాజెక్టుల ప్రారంభోత్సవాలు చేయనున్నారు. ఈ పర్యటనలో అత్యంత ఆసక్తికరమైన అంశం ఏమిటంటే, గత రెండు దశాబ్దాలుగా తన రాజకీయ ప్రయాణంలో కష్టసుఖాల్లో తోడుగా నిలిచిన పాత మిత్రులు, ఆత్మీయ అనుచరులు, మరియు స్థానిక కాంగ్రెస్ నాయకులతో కలిసి సీఎం రేవంత్ రెడ్డి ప్రత్యేకంగా భోజనం చేయనున్నారు. ఈ ఆత్మీయ సమ్మేళనం పాత జ్ఞాపకాలను నెమరవేసుకోవడంతో పాటు, క్షేత్రస్థాయి క్యాడర్‌లో మరింత బలమైన రాజకీయ బంధాన్ని పెంపొందించేందుకు దోహదపడనుంది.

జులై 10న రాష్ట్రవ్యాప్తంగా విద్యాసంస్థలు బంద్

title: Funerals held for 14 Pakistani children killed in tutoring center collapse
description: Police are investigating whether negligence during construction work caused the collapse in the eastern city of Lahore on Tuesday.
content: Police are investigating whether negligence during construction work caused the collapse in the eastern city of Lahore on Tuesday.(Image credit: K.M. Chaudary)

title: चीन में सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के रोजगार और उद्यमिता बढ़ाने पर नियम लागू होगा
description:
चीनी प्रधानमंत्री ली छ्यांग ने हाल में राज्य परिषद का आदेश दिया। सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के रोज़गार और उद्यमिता बढ़ाने पर नियम इस साल 1 अगस्त को लागू होगा। नियम का उद्देश्य है सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के रोजगार के अवसर और उद्यमिता बढ़ाया जाय, सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के मानव संसाधन की भूमिका निभाई जाए, सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के कानूनी.
The post चीन में सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के रोजगार और उद्यमिता बढ़ाने पर नियम लागू होगा appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
चीनी प्रधानमंत्री ली छ्यांग ने हाल में राज्य परिषद का आदेश दिया। सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के रोज़गार और उद्यमिता बढ़ाने पर नियम इस साल 1 अगस्त को लागू होगा। नियम का उद्देश्य है सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के रोजगार के अवसर और उद्यमिता बढ़ाया जाय, सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के मानव संसाधन की भूमिका निभाई जाए, सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के कानूनी हितों की रक्षा की जाए और सैनिकों को समाज में सम्मानित पेशा बनाया जाए।
नियम में कहा गया है कि सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों के रोज़गार और उद्यमिता से जुड़े कार्य में समावेशी और उदार नीति को मिलाने के सिद्धांत पर कायम रहता है। सरकार के प्रोत्साहन में, बाजार के निर्देश में और समाज के समर्थन में रोज़गार और उद्यमिता करने में सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों का प्रोत्साहन और समर्थन किया जाएगा। करियर चुनने का सही विचार रखने में सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों को मार्गदर्शन दिया जाएगा।
नियम के अनुसार सरकार सेवानिवृत्त सैनिकों का शिक्षण और प्रशिक्षण मजबूत करेगी। राष्ट्रीय शिक्षा परीक्षा में भाग लेने और औपचारिक शिक्षा प्राप्त करने में सेवानिवृत्त सैनिक संबंधित नियम के अनुसार उदार नीति और सब्सिडी का फायदा उठा सकते हैं। इसके अलावा, नियम में रोजगार अधिमान्य उपाय और उद्यमिता समर्थन उपाय भी निश्चित किए गए।
(साभार- चाइना मीडिया ग्रुप, पेइचिंग)

title: PM Narendra Modi pays tribute to Vijaya Mehta as she passes away at 91
description: Legendary Marathi theatre icon Vijaya Mehta, affectionately known as "Bai," has passed away in Mumbai at 91. A pioneer of modern Marathi theatre and a significant figure in parallel cinema, Mehta's influential career spanned over six decades. Her dedication to artistic excellence and groundbreaking work inspired generations of performers and filmmakers. Prime Minister Modi mourned her loss, acknowledging her towering presence in India's cultural landscape.

title: IGP Kashmir reviews multi-layered security measures for Amarnath Yatra at Pahalgam
description:
Srinagar, July 1: As part of the extensive security preparations for the forthcoming Shri Amarnath Ji Yatra-2026, Inspector General of Police (IGP) Kashmir V. K. Birdi on Wednesday conducted a comprehensive visit to Pahalgam to review the security arrangements along the Yatra route and assess the operational preparedness of the security grid.
During the visit, the IGP inspected the X-ray Screening Point, where he reviewed the passenger and baggage screening mechanism. He emphasized the importance of meticulous screening, seamless coordination among all agencies, and strict adherence to Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) to ensure a safe, secure, and hassle-free pilgrimage for the devotees.
The IGP also visited the Nunwan Base Camp and undertook a detailed assessment of the overall security architecture, deployment plans, surveillance mechanisms, access control measures, and emergency response preparedness. He interacted with officers and personnel deployed on the ground and appreciated their dedication, professionalism, and commitment towards ensuring foolproof security arrangements for the Yatra.
Reviewing the multi-layered security measures, V. K. Birdi directed officers to maintain a high level of alertness, strengthen inter-agency coordination, and ensure the effective implementation of all security protocols. He stressed the need for proactive policing, continuous monitoring, and swift response to any contingency to facilitate the smooth, peaceful, and incident-free conduct of the annual pilgrimage.
The IGP was accompanied by DIG South Kashmir Range Javid Iqbal Matoo, DIG Yatra Sameer Sharma, SSP Anantnag Amod Ashok Nagpure, along with other senior officers of J&K Police.
The visit forms part of the ongoing series of inspections being undertaken by senior police officers to review operational preparedness and further strengthen the security framework ahead of the commencement of the Shri Amarnath Ji Yatra-2026.

title: నితిన్ నబీన్, ఖర్గేకూ ఇరాన్ ఆహ్వానం
description: Ali Khamenei Funeral : ఇరాన్ మాజీ సుప్రీం లీడర్ ఆయతొల్లా అలీ ఖమేనీ అంత్యక్రియల కార్యక్రమానికి హాజరు కావాలంటూ భారతదేశంలోని ప్రముఖ రాజకీయ నాయకులకు ఇరాన్...
content:
Ali Khamenei Funeral : ఇరాన్ మాజీ సుప్రీం లీడర్ ఆయతొల్లా అలీ ఖమేనీ అంత్యక్రియల కార్యక్రమానికి హాజరు కావాలంటూ భారతదేశంలోని ప్రముఖ రాజకీయ నాయకులకు ఇరాన్ ప్రభుత్వం నుండి అధికారిక ఆహ్వానాలు అందాయి. అఖిల భారత కాంగ్రెస్ కమిటీ (AICC) అధ్యక్షుడు మల్లికార్జున ఖర్గే, కాంగ్రెస్ సీనియర్ నాయకుడు సల్మాన్ ఖుర్షీద్‌లతో పాటు భారతీయ జనతా పార్టీ (BJP) జాతీయ అధ్యక్షుడు నితిన్ నబీన్‌లకు ఇరాన్ దౌత్య కార్యాలయం ప్రత్యేక ఇన్విటేషన్లను పంపింది. జూలై 4వ తేదీ నుంచి ఇరాన్‌లో అత్యంత అధికారిక లాంఛనాలతో (State Funeral) ఈ అంత్యక్రియల ప్రక్రియ ప్రారంభం కానుంది. ఇప్పటికే ఈ కార్యక్రమానికి భారత ప్రధానమంత్రి నరేంద్ర మోదీకి కూడా ఆహ్వానం అందిన సంగతి తెలిసిందే. దౌత్యపరమైన సంబంధాల రీత్యా అంతర్జాతీయంగా ఎంతో ప్రాధాన్యత సంతరించుకున్న ఈ క్రతువుకు ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా పలు దేశాల ప్రతినిధులు హాజరవుతున్నారు.



Read Also : ఆగి ఉన్న లారీని ఢీకొట్టిన భక్తుల వాహనం.. ముగ్గురు యాత్రికులు మృతి!



 







భారత్ తరఫున అధికారిక ప్రతినిధి బృందం



అలీ ఖమేనీ అంత్యక్రియల నేపథ్యంలో భారతదేశం తరఫున ఒక ఉన్నత స్థాయి అధికారిక ప్రతినిధి బృందం ఇరాన్ పర్యటనకు వెళ్లనుంది. ఈ అధికారిక బృందంలో భారత ప్రభుత్వం తరఫున బిహార్ గవర్నర్, రిటైర్డ్ లెఫ్టినెంట్ జనరల్ సయ్యద్ అతా హస్నైన్ మరియు కేంద్ర విదేశాంగ శాఖ సహాయ మంత్రి పబిత్రా మార్గెరిటాలు హాజరు కానున్నారు. పశ్చిమాసియా (Middle East) రాజకీయాల్లో సుదీర్ఘ కాలం పాటు అత్యంత కీలక పాత్ర పోషించిన ఒక అగ్రనేత నిష్క్రమణ సందర్భంలో ఇరాన్‌తో దౌత్య, వ్యూహాత్మక బంధాన్ని కొనసాగించేందుకు భారత్ ఈ ప్రాతినిధ్యాన్ని ఖరారు చేసింది. ఇరు దేశాల మధ్య ఉన్న చారిత్రక సంబంధాలను ప్రతిబింబిస్తూ, అటు ప్రభుత్వ ప్రతినిధులతో పాటు ఇటు ప్రధాన ప్రతిపక్ష, అధికార పార్టీల అగ్రనేతలకు కూడా ఆహ్వానాలు అందడం అంతర్జాతీయ దౌత్య వర్గాల్లో ఆసక్తికర చర్చకు దారితీసింది.

title: ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ କଳଙ୍କ: ନାବାଳିକା ଶାଳୀଙ୍କୁ ଗର୍ଭବତୀ କଲେ ଭିଣୋଇ, ଏମିତି ଧରାପଡିଲା…
description:
ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି,୧ା୭(ଗିରିଧାରୀ ପରିଛା): ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ଗାରାବନ୍ଧ ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ରାୟଗଡ଼ ବ୍ଲକର ସାନ ଅନତାରସିଂ ଗ୍ରାମରୁ ଏକ ଲଜ୍ଜାଜନକ ଘଟଣା ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି । ଜଣେ ବିବାହିତ ଯୁବକ ନିଜର ୧୭ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ନାବାଳିକା ଶାଳୀଙ୍କ ସହ ସମ୍ପର୍କ ସ୍ଥାପନ କରି ତାଙ୍କୁ ଗର୍ଭବତୀ କରିଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗରେ ପୋଲିସ ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। ପୋଲିସର କହିବା ଅନୁସାରେ, ସାନ ଅନତାରସିଂ ଗ୍ରାମର ପ୍ରମୋଦ ଶବର (୨୫) ବିଭିନ୍ନ ପ୍ରଲୋଭନ ଦେଖାଇ ନାବାଳିକା ଶାଳୀଙ୍କ ସହ ବାରମ୍ବାର ଶାରୀରିକ ସମ୍ପର୍କ […]
The post ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ କଳଙ୍କ: ନାବାଳିକା ଶାଳୀଙ୍କୁ ଗର୍ଭବତୀ କଲେ ଭିଣୋଇ, ଏମିତି ଧରାପଡିଲା… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି,୧ା୭(ଗିରିଧାରୀ ପରିଛା): ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ଗାରାବନ୍ଧ ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ରାୟଗଡ଼ ବ୍ଲକର ସାନ ଅନତାରସିଂ ଗ୍ରାମରୁ ଏକ ଲଜ୍ଜାଜନକ ଘଟଣା ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି । ଜଣେ ବିବାହିତ ଯୁବକ ନିଜର ୧୭ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ନାବାଳିକା ଶାଳୀଙ୍କ ସହ ସମ୍ପର୍କ ସ୍ଥାପନ କରି ତାଙ୍କୁ ଗର୍ଭବତୀ କରିଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗରେ ପୋଲିସ ଗିରଫ କରିଛି।
ପୋଲିସର କହିବା ଅନୁସାରେ, ସାନ ଅନତାରସିଂ ଗ୍ରାମର ପ୍ରମୋଦ ଶବର (୨୫) ବିଭିନ୍ନ ପ୍ରଲୋଭନ ଦେଖାଇ ନାବାଳିକା ଶାଳୀଙ୍କ ସହ ବାରମ୍ବାର ଶାରୀରିକ ସମ୍ପର୍କ ରଖିଥିଲେ। ଫଳରେ ନାବାଳିକା ଜଣକ ଛଅ ମାସର ଗର୍ଭବତୀ ହୋଇଥିଲେ। ଘଟଣାଟି ଦୀର୍ଘଦିନ ଧରି ଗୋପନରେ ଚାଲିଥିବା ବେଳେ ପରିବାର ଲୋକେ ଏହା ଜାଣିବା ପରେ ନାବାଳିକାଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଗାରାବନ୍ଧ ଥାନାରେ ଲିଖିତ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।
ଅଭିଯୋଗକୁ ଭିତ୍ତି କରି ଗାରାବନ୍ଧ ଥାନାରେ କେସ୍ ନଂ–୫୦/୨୬ ରେ ପୋକ୍ସୋ ଆଇନ ଏବଂ ଭାରତୀୟ ନ୍ୟାୟ ସଂହିତାର ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ଧାରାରେ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଡାକ୍ତରୀ ପରୀକ୍ଷାରେ ନାବାଳିକା ଛଅ ମାସର ଗର୍ଭବତୀ ଥିବା ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇଥିଲା।
ତଦନ୍ତ ପରେ ପୋଲିସ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ପ୍ରମୋଦ ଶବରଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରି କୋର୍ଟଚାଲାଣ କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଗାରାବନ୍ଧ ଥାନା ଅଧିକାରୀ ପ୍ରଶାନ୍ତ କୁମାର ନିସିକା ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି।
 

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ କଳଙ୍କ: ନାବାଳିକା ଶାଳୀଙ୍କୁ ଗର୍ଭବତୀ କଲେ ଭିଣୋଇ, ଏମିତି ଧରାପଡିଲା… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: No hurry on 'One nation, one election' report, says parliamentary panel chief
জোনাইৰ বানাক্ৰান্তৰ কাষত কেন্দ্ৰীয় মন্ত্ৰী শিৱৰাজ সিং চৌহান আৰু কিৰেণ ৰিজিজু...
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্কঃ বুধবাৰে অসমত উপস্থতি হয় কেন্দ্ৰীয় কৃষি মন্ত্ৰী শিৱৰাজ সিং চৌহান আৰু কেন্দ্ৰীয় সংসদীয় পৰিক্ৰমা মন্ত্ৰী কিৰেণ ৰিজিজু। অৰুণাচলপ্ৰদেশ আৰু ধেমাজিৰ সাম্প্ৰতিক বান পৰিস্থিতিৰ বুজ লোৱাৰ উদ্দেশ্যে দুদিনীয়া ভ্ৰমণসূচীৰে ৰাজ্যত উপস্থিত হয় দুয়োগৰাকী কেন্দ্ৰীয় মন্ত্ৰী।
বানবিধ্বস্ত জোনাইৰ ভিন্ন এলেকা পৰিদৰ্শন কৰে কেন্দ্ৰীয় মন্ত্ৰীদ্বয়ে। দিখাৰী নদীৰ বাঢ়নী পানীত ক্ষতিগ্ৰস্ত হোৱা জোনাইৰ এলেকাসমূহ পৰিদৰ্শন কৰি বানাক্ৰান্তসকলৰ সৈতে দুয়োগৰাকী কেন্দ্ৰীয় মন্ত্ৰীয়ে কৰে মতবিনিময়৷
লগতে চিমেন চাপৰিৰ চিমেন নদীৰ প্ৰৱল সোঁতত ভাগি পৰা ৰে'ল দলং পৰিদৰ্শন কৰে তেওঁলোকে। ইফালে বানাক্ৰান্তৰে মত-বিনিময় কৰি খোৱাপানী, ৰাস্তা-ঘাট, বানত ক্ষতিগ্ৰস্ত হোৱা খেতিপথাৰ আদিৰ বাবে ব্যৱস্থা গ্ৰহণ কৰি পুনঃসংস্থাপনৰ আশ্বাস প্ৰদান কৰে কেন্দ্ৰীয় মন্ত্ৰী চৌহানে।
কেন্দ্ৰীয় মন্ত্ৰীগৰাকীয়ে কয়- "আমি বানত ক্ষতিগ্ৰস্ত অঞ্চলসমূহ পৰিদৰ্শন কৰিলো, বৰ দুখ লগা পৰিৱেশ ৷ কৃষিভূমি বালিত পোট গৈছে, বিধ্বস্ত হৈছে ৰাস্ত-ঘাট, বাসস্থানৰ অসুবিধা৷ ৰাইজৰ দুখৰ সময়ত আমি তেওঁলোকৰ সৈতে আছো ৷ সেয়ে তাৎক্ষণিকভাবে ব্যৱস্থা গ্ৰহণ কৰি কিছু সমস্যা সমাধানৰ চেষ্টা কৰা হৈছে৷ লগতে ক্ষতিগ্ৰস্ত খেতিয়কসকলৰ বাবে বিকল্প ব্যৱস্থাৰো চিন্তা কৰি থকা হৈছে ৷"
উল্লেখ্য যে, অৰুণাচল প্ৰদেশ আৰু অসমৰ সীমান্তত হোৱা ধাৰাসাৰ বৃষ্টিপাতৰ ফলতেই পাহাৰৰ পৰা নামি অহা কেইবাখনো নৈয়ে জোনাইৰ বিভিন্ন অঞ্চল বিস্তৰ ক্ষতিসাধন কৰিছে। ২০ খনৰো অধিক গাঁৱৰ প্ৰায় ৫ শতাধিক পৰিয়ালক বানত আক্ৰান্ত হৈছে৷

Curiosity Blog, Sols 4934-4940: In the Land of the Polygons







NASA’s Mars rover Curiosity acquired this image of polygonal structures using its Mast Camera (Mastcam) on June 21, 2026 — Sol 4932, or Martian day 4,932 of the Mars Science Laboratory mission — at 14:57:55 UTC.
NASA/JPL-Caltech/MSSS



Written by William Farrand, Senior Research Scientist, Space Science Institute
Earth planning date: Friday, June 26, 2026
There were two planning cycles over this span of sols. The Monday planning took place with Curiosity situated within a unit that from orbital imagery appeared light-toned, and from earlier rover positions appeared smooth. Reaching this unit, the rover team was surprised to see the unit covered with polygonal structures like the top of a giant Martian honeycomb. Driving further into the unit, the polygonal ridges were more eroded. Littered about this unit are pebble to cobble-sized dark-toned rocks. A still-to-be-resolved question is whether these are bits of Mars that “floated” down from higher in the stratigraphy, were ejected from distant impacts outside of Gale crater, or are meteorites from beyond Mars altogether. Examination of some previous dark “float” rocks indicated the presence of nickel, common in meteorites but less so in Martian rocks, but are all of the dark-toned pebbles and cobbles meteorites? Further investigations should help in answering this question.
Monday’s four-sol plan had APXS and MAHLI investigations looking at the ridges and centers of the polygons. The plan also included ChemCam Remote Micro-Imager (RMI) views of the “Miraflores” small knob and of the “Cordillera” mesa. Similar to the contact science activities, ChemCam LIBS measurements were focused on the polygons, with two measurements on different ridges and one on a polygon center. A ChemCam passive reflectance measurement of one of the aforementioned dark cobbles was also carried out. Environmental activities included a Navcam dust-devil search and atmospheric opacity (“tau”) measurements.
After driving further towards the upper boundary of the light-toned, polygon-covered unit, the three-sol Friday plan included APXS and MAHLI measurements of another polygon ridge and one of the dark-toned cobbles, “Cortadera.” ChemCam LIBS was also targeted on “Cortadera” and on a polygon ridge. ChemCam RMI was targeted on the top and base of the “Cordillera” mesa. Mastcam mosaics were planned of “Cordillera,” nearby troughs, part of the nearby “Valle Grande” channel, and documentation of LIBS targets and the Mastcam calibration target.
In the coming week, Curiosity will cross over into another band of materials which appear darker-toned in orbital images and rougher-textured, as viewed currently by the rover.

title: दिंडोरी शहरात ‘दोन दिवसा आड’ पाणी पुरवठ्याचा निर्णय
description: दिंडोरी । प्रतिनिधी Dindori ऐन पावसाळ्याच्या तोंडावर दिंडोरी शहरावर तीव्र पाणीटंचाईचे संकट ओढवले असून शहराची जीवनवाहिनी असलेल्या ओझरखेड धरणातील पाणीपातळी कमालीची खालावली आहे. सध्या धरणात केवळ 25.67 टक्के इतकाच मर्यादित पाणीसाठा शिल्लक राहिल्याने दिंडोरी नगरपंचायतीने कडक निर्णय घेतला आहे. शहरात सद्यस्थितीत सुरू असलेला ‘एक दिवस आड’ पाणीपुरवठा आता तातडीने बंद करण्यात येणार असून, आगामी सोमवार […]
content:
दिंडोरी । प्रतिनिधी Dindori



ऐन पावसाळ्याच्या तोंडावर दिंडोरी शहरावर तीव्र पाणीटंचाईचे संकट ओढवले असून शहराची जीवनवाहिनी असलेल्या ओझरखेड धरणातील पाणीपातळी कमालीची खालावली आहे. सध्या धरणात केवळ 25.67 टक्के इतकाच मर्यादित पाणीसाठा शिल्लक राहिल्याने दिंडोरी नगरपंचायतीने कडक निर्णय घेतला आहे. शहरात सद्यस्थितीत सुरू असलेला ‘एक दिवस आड’ पाणीपुरवठा आता तातडीने बंद करण्यात येणार असून, आगामी सोमवार दि. 6 जुलै 2026 पासून संपूर्ण शहराला ‘दोन दिवस आड’ पाणीपुरवठा केला जाणार आहे. तरी नागरिकांनी दिंडोरी नगरपंचायतीस सहकार्य करण्याचे आवाहन केले आहे.



दिंडोरी शहराला ओझरखेड धरणातून पाणी उपसा करून पाणीपुरवठा केला जातो. आतापर्यंत शहराला एक दिवस आड पाणी देऊन पाणीपुरवठा सुरळीत ठेवण्याचा प्रयत्न केला जात होता. मात्र, यावर्षी पावसाने ओढ दिल्याने किंवा धरणातील पाणीसाठा कमालीचा घटल्याने चिंता वाढली आहे. सध्या उपलब्ध असलेल्या 25.67 % पाणीसाठ्याचा विचार करता जर पूर्वीप्रमाणेच पाणी उपसा सुरू ठेवला तर आगामी काळात शहराला अत्यंत भीषण पाणीटंचाईचा सामना करावा लागू शकतो. ही संभाव्य परिस्थिती लक्षात घेऊन प्रशासनाने आधीच खबरदारीचा उपाय म्हणून पाणी कपातीचे हे धोरण स्वीकारले आहे.



येत्या सोमवारपासून दि. 6 जुलै रोजीपासून शहरात दोन दिवस आड पाणी सोडले जाणार असल्याने नागरिकांनी उपलब्ध पाणी अत्यंत काटकसरीने वापरावे. पिण्याच्या पाण्याचा वापर वाहने धुणे, अंगणात टाकणे किंवा इतर कारणांसाठी करून पाणी वाया घालवू नये, त्याचप्रमाणे ओझरखेड धरणातील पाणीसाठा अतिशय अल्प झाला आहे. पुढील काळात शहरावर मोठे पाणी संकट ओढवू नये, म्हणून पाणी पुरवठ्याच्या वेळापत्रकात हा बदल करणे अपरिहार्य झाले आहे. दिंडोरी शहरातील सर्व सुज्ञ नागरिकांनी या परिस्थितीचे गांभीर्य ओळखावे. पाण्याचा प्रत्येक थेंब जपून वापरावा आणि नगरपंचायत प्रशासनाला सहकार्य करावे, असे आवाहन नगराध्यक्षा आशा कराटे, उपनगराध्यक्षा माधुरी साळुंखे, पाणी पुरवठा व स्वच्छता सभापती ज्योती देशमुख, मुख्याधिकारी संदीप चौधरी यांनी केले आहे.

title: Trump debuts new Air Force One: A patriotic boeing 747 with new look and enhanced capabilities - Know more
description: The aircraft, featuring a striking red, white, dark blue, and gold color scheme personally selected by Trump, will serve as the new presidential plane during his trip to dedicate the Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library.
content: The United States President Donald Trump took to the skies aboard the United States’ new Air Force One on Wednesday, marking the debut flight of a refurbished Boeing 747 gifted by the Qatari government. The aircraft, featuring a striking red, white, dark blue, and gold color scheme personally selected by Trump, will serve as the new presidential plane during his trip to dedicate the Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library, according to Reuters.New exterior designThe new Air Force One stands out with its distinctive patriotic livery, blending classic American colors with elegant gold accents chosen by the President. Images released ahead of the flight show the aircraft gleaming at Joint Base Andrews, Maryland, ready for its inaugural presidential mission.Trump has expressed strong enthusiasm for the plane’s appearance. During a recent unveiling, he reportedly stated, "There will never be one like this," highlighting its unique and luxurious presentation.Advanced specifications and Boeing 747-8 platformBuilt on the Boeing 747-8 platform, the aircraft offers significant upgrades over the aging VC-25A fleet it aims to supplement or replace. As a jumbo jet, it provides extended range, larger capacity, and enhanced performance suitable for long-haul presidential travel. The plane underwent rapid refurbishment to meet U.S. Air Force standards, transforming the gifted luxury airliner into a fully operational presidential aircraft.Security and defence featuresWhile specific classified details remain undisclosed, the U.S. Air Force has confirmed that the new Air Force One meets all presidential security and operational standards. The aircraft incorporates advanced defensive systems, secure communications, and hardened electronics typical of VC-25 variants -- capabilities designed to protect the President against a wide range of threats, including electromagnetic pulses and missile attacks.Trump’s flight to North Dakota aligns with celebrations of America’s 250th anniversary. The visit honors Theodore Roosevelt, whom Trump frequently praises as a symbol of strength and vision. "Theodore Roosevelt believed America’s greatest work was always still ahead," said Interior Secretary Doug Burgum. “President Trump shares that conviction in American greatness, and in the belief that this nation’s finest age is yet to come.”With Reuters inputs

title: పెట్రోల్ రేట్ల తగ్గింపు అప్పుడేనా ?
description: Petrol Diesel Price : దేశీయ ఇంధన మార్కెట్లో ప్రైవేట్ చమురు సంస్థ ‘నయారా ఎనర్జీ’ పెట్రోల్, డీజిల్ ధరలను తగ్గించడంతో, ప్రభుత్వ రంగ సంస్థలైన ఇండియన్...
content:
Petrol Diesel Price : దేశీయ ఇంధన మార్కెట్లో ప్రైవేట్ చమురు సంస్థ ‘నయారా ఎనర్జీ’ పెట్రోల్, డీజిల్ ధరలను తగ్గించడంతో, ప్రభుత్వ రంగ సంస్థలైన ఇండియన్ ఆయిల్ కార్పొరేషన్ (IOCL), భారత్ పెట్రోలియం (BPCL), హిందుస్థాన్ పెట్రోలియం (HPCL) కూడా రేట్లను తగ్గిస్తాయనే ఆశలు వాహనదారుల్లో చిగురించాయి. అయితే, సామాన్యులకు ఇప్పట్లో ఇంధన ధరల తగ్గింపు నుండి ఊరట లభించే పరిస్థితి లేదని ప్రముఖ వార్తా సంస్థ ‘NDTV’ ఒక నివేదికలో స్పష్టం చేసింది. ప్రైవేట్ సంస్థలు పోటీని పెంచేందుకు రేట్లు తగ్గించినప్పటికీ, ప్రభుత్వ రంగ చమురు మార్కెటింగ్ కంపెనీలు (OMCs) మాత్రం ప్రస్తుతానికి అదే పాత ధరలను కొనసాగించే యోచనలో ఉన్నాయి. అంతర్జాతీయ మార్కెట్లో ముడి చమురు ధరలు కొంత మేర అదుపులోకి వచ్చినప్పటికీ, దేశీయంగా ప్రభుత్వ సంస్థలు ధరల తగ్గింపుపై వెనకడుగు వేయడం గమనార్హం.



Read Also : ఇళయరాజాకు ఢిల్లీ హైకోర్టులో షాక్.. కోర్టు కీలక ఆదేశాలు



Additional Excise Duty on Petrol Exports







పాత నష్టాల రికవరీపై కన్ను: మరో రెండు నెలల పాటు ఇదే ఒడిదుడుకులు!



ప్రభుత్వ చమురు సంస్థలు ఇప్పట్లో ధరలను తగ్గించకపోవడానికి ప్రధాన కారణం గతంలో వాటికి వచ్చిన భారీ నష్టాలేనని విశ్లేషకులు చెబుతున్నారు. పశ్చిమాసియా (Middle East) సంక్షోభం మరియు ఉద్రిక్తతల సమయంలో అంతర్జాతీయంగా క్రూడాయిల్ ధరలు విపరీతంగా పెరిగినప్పుడు, దేశీయంగా ఇంధన ధరలను పెంచకుండా నియంత్రించారు. ఆ సమయంలో ఈ ప్రభుత్వ రంగ సంస్థలు రోజుకు రూ.500 నుంచి రూ.600 కోట్ల వరకు భారీ నష్టాలను చవిచూశాయి. ప్రస్తుతం అంతర్జాతీయ మార్కెట్ అనుకూలంగా ఉన్నందున, ఆ పాత నష్టాలను పూర్తిగా పూడ్చుకునే (Loss Recovery) పనిలో చమురు సంస్థలు నిమగ్నమయ్యాయి. ఈ రికవరీ ప్రక్రియ పూర్తి కావడానికి మరో రెండు నెలల సమయం పడుతుందని, అంతవరకు పెంచిన ధరలే మార్కెట్లో కొనసాగుతాయని పరిశ్రమ వర్గాలు అంచనా వేస్తున్నాయి.

title: चिलचिलाती गर्मी के “चीनी समाधान” पर “नियमों का घेरे” में ब्रुसेल्स
description:
यूरोप अभूतपूर्व भीषण गर्मी का सामना कर रहा है। पूर्वी जर्मनी में तापमान 41.5 डिग्री सेल्सियस तक पहुंच गया, पश्चिमी फ्रांस में 43 डिग्री सेल्सियस तक और ब्रिटेन ने भीषण गर्मी का अपना रिकॉर्ड तोड़ दिया। जहां यूरोपीय लोग गर्मी से बेहाल हैं, वहीं चीन से आयातित मोबाइल स्प्लिट एयर कंडीशनर, हैंडहेल्ड पंखे, आइस मेकर.
The post चिलचिलाती गर्मी के “चीनी समाधान” पर “नियमों का घेरे” में ब्रुसेल्स appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
यूरोप अभूतपूर्व भीषण गर्मी का सामना कर रहा है। पूर्वी जर्मनी में तापमान 41.5 डिग्री सेल्सियस तक पहुंच गया, पश्चिमी फ्रांस में 43 डिग्री सेल्सियस तक और ब्रिटेन ने भीषण गर्मी का अपना रिकॉर्ड तोड़ दिया। जहां यूरोपीय लोग गर्मी से बेहाल हैं, वहीं चीन से आयातित मोबाइल स्प्लिट एयर कंडीशनर, हैंडहेल्ड पंखे, आइस मेकर और अन्य “कूलिंग गैजेट्स” पूरे महाद्वीप में धड़ल्ले से बिक रहे हैं। एक उपभोक्ता आखिरी मोबाइल स्प्लिट एयर कंडीशनर खरीदने के लिए 200 किलोमीटर की दूरी तय करके गया, लेकिन उसे पता चला कि कीमत 100 यूरो बढ़ गई है।
इसी बीच, बेल्जियम की राजधानी ब्रुसेल्स में, चीनी वाणिज्य मंत्री वांग वनथाओ और यूरोपीय आयोग के व्यापार और आर्थिक सुरक्षा आयुक्त मारोस शेफकोविच ने चीन-यूरोपीय संघ व्यापार एवं निवेश परामर्श तंत्र का पहला सम्मेलन आयोजित किया और एक संयुक्त बयान जारी किया। दोनों पक्षों ने चार कार्यकारी समूहों की स्थापना पर सहमति व्यक्त की: व्यापार एवं निवेश संतुलन, निर्यात नियंत्रण, बौद्धिक संपदा और विश्व व्यापार संगठन (डब्ल्यूटीओ) सुधार। एक संयुक्त निगरानी तंत्र की स्थापना, व्यापार सम्बंधी आंकड़ों का आदान-प्रदान, व्यापारिक विवादों का प्रबंधन और 2026 की शरद ऋतु में एक और मंत्रिस्तरीय सम्मेलन आयोजित करने पर भी सहमति हासिल हुई। एक तरफ चीनी उत्पादों को यूरोपीय उपभोक्ताओं द्वारा धड़ल्ले से खरीदा जा रहा है, तो दूसरी तरफ दोनों पक्ष बातचीत की मेज पर संस्थागत ढांचा तैयार कर रहे हैं। ये दोनों घटनाएँ भले ही समानांतर प्रतीत होती हैं, लेकिन वास्तव में ये मिलकर चीन-यूरोपीय संघ के आर्थिक और व्यापारिक सम्बंधों की वास्तविक तस्वीर को रेखांकित करती हैं।
चीन के “कूलिंग गैजेट्स” इतनी धड़ल्ले से क्यों बिक रहे हैं? इसका जवाब यूरोपीय लोगों की लंबे समय से चली आ रही ‘एयर कंडीशनिंग समस्या’ में छिपा है। यूरोपीय घरों में एयर कंडीशनिंग की पैठ दर केवल लगभग 20% है। ऐसा नहीं है कि यूरोपीय लोग गर्मी से नहीं डरते, बल्कि वे इसे लगा नहीं सकते, खर्च नहीं कर सकते और उपयोग नहीं कर सकते। पुरानी इमारतों की दीवारों की संरचना जटिल है, ऐतिहासिक संरक्षण वाली इमारतों में बाहरी दीवारों पर ड्रिलिंग सख्त वर्जित है, और अनुमोदन प्रक्रिया में अक्सर महीनों लग जाते हैं। एक सामान्य स्प्लिट एयर कंडीशनर की कीमत कुछ सौ यूरो होती है, लेकिन स्थापना शुल्क 2,000-3,000 यूरो तक पहुँच जाता है। बर्लिन में घरेलू बिजली की दर लगभग 0.4 यूरो प्रति किलोवाट-घंटा है, और एक एयर कंडीशनर के उपयोग से मासिक बिजली बिल में सौ यूरो से अधिक की वृद्धि हो जाती है।
अतीत में, यूरोप की गर्मियाँ हल्की और सहनीय थीं। लेकिन अब अत्यधिक गर्मी सामान्य बात हो गई है, इसलिए ठंडक पाना वैकल्पिक से अनिवार्य हो गया है। चीनी कंपनियों ने यूरोप की इस समस्या को भाँपते हुए तुरंत मोबाइल स्प्लिट एयर कंडीशनर पेश किया – जिसमें ड्रिलिंग की आवश्यकता नहीं होती, बाहरी इकाई को बालकनी पर रखा जा सकता है, भीतरी इकाई को स्थानांतरित किया जा सकता है, और इसका शीतलन प्रभाव पारंपरिक स्प्लिट एयर कंडीशनर के समान है। यूरोपीय भवनों, जलवायु, बिजली की दरों और विनियमों को ध्यान में रखते हुए, चीनी कंपनियों ने विशेष रूप से उत्पाद मापदंडों को समायोजित किया और उन्हें यूरोपीय मानकों के भीतर सख्ती से नियंत्रित किया। यह बाजार कम कीमत पर ‘अत्यधिक प्रतिस्पर्धा’ के कारण नहीं जीता गया है, बल्कि बुद्धिमत्ता के साथ ‘समाधान’ के कारण जीता गया है – आपके सामने कोई भी समस्या हो, मेरे पास उसके लिए उत्पाद है। आपूर्ति की इस प्रतिक्रिया क्षमता को ही चीनी विनिर्माण प्रणाली की मूल प्रतिस्पर्धात्मकता कहा जाता है।
लेकिन चीनी एयर कंडीशनरों की धड़ल्ले की बिक्री के साथ-साथ यूरोपीय संघ में व्यापार सम्बंधी चिंता भी बढ़ती जा रही है। वर्ष 2025 में यूरोपीय संघ का चीन के साथ वस्तु व्यापार घाटा बढ़कर लगभग 360 अरब यूरो हो गया, जो 2019 की तुलना में दोगुने से भी अधिक है। चीनी नई ऊर्जा वाहन, लिथियम बैटरी और सौर उत्पादों की यूरोपीय बाजार में पैठ दर लगातार बढ़ रही है। इससे पहले यूरोपीय संघ चीनी इलेक्ट्रिक वाहनों पर अधिकतम 35.3% तक का सब्सिडी विरोधी शुल्क लगा चुका है, विदेशी सब्सिडी विनियमन के तहत चीनी कंपनियों के खिलाफ कई जाँच शुरू कर चुका है, और अधिक प्रतिबंधात्मक उपायों की तैयारी भी कर रहा है। चीन-यूरोपीय संघ व्यापार सम्बंध एक बार फिर ‘बातचीत और टकराव’ के चौराहे पर खड़े हो गए हैं।
इसी मोड़ पर संयुक्त बयान और भी महत्वपूर्ण हो जाता है। दोनों पक्षों ने मतभेदों से बचने के बजाय उन्हें संस्थागत माध्यमों से ‘नियंत्रित दायरे’ में बाँधने का रास्ता चुना। बयान में सबसे ठोस सामग्री इस प्रकार है – पहला, संयुक्त निगरानी तंत्र स्थापित करना, व्यापार डेटा का आदान-प्रदान करना, व्यापार प्रवाह पर नज़र रखना और पारदर्शिता बढ़ाना; इसका मतलब है कि भविष्य में दोनों पक्षों के व्यापार विवादों के लिए भावनात्मक आधार के बजाय डेटा-आधारित निर्णय का आधार होगा। दूसरा, निर्यात नियंत्रण संवाद में सकारात्मक परिणाम प्राप्त हुए हैं। दोनों पक्ष दुर्लभ पृथ्वी तत्व और प्रमुख कच्चे माल के क्षेत्र में संवाद बढ़ाने को तैयार हैं, और वैश्विक आपूर्ति एवं उत्पादन श्रृंखला की स्थिरता बनाए रखने के लिए सुविधाजनक उपायों पर सहमत हैं। तीसरा, बाजार पहुंच विस्तार पर परामर्श करने, मुद्दों की सूची का आदान-प्रदान करने और ठोस प्रगति हासिल करने पर सहमति बनी है। इन संस्थागत व्यवस्थाओं का मूल तर्क यह है – प्रतिस्पर्धा अपरिहार्य है, लेकिन प्रतिस्पर्धा के लिए नियमों के घेरे (सुरक्षा कवच) की आवश्यकता होती है।
सीमा शुल्क बाधाएँ बाजार की वास्तविक माँग के सामने सीमित प्रभावी होती हैं। यूरोपीय एयर कंडीशनिंग बाजार की चुनौतियाँ – स्थापना में कठिनाई, महंगा श्रम, धीमी अनुमोदन प्रक्रिया – चीन के कारण पैदा नहीं हुई हैं। अतिरिक्त शुल्क लगाने से उपभोक्ताओं को वही उत्पाद खरीदने के लिए अधिक पैसे चुकाने पड़ेंगे। संयुक्त बयान में नए शुल्क या प्रतिबंधात्मक उपायों की घोषणा नहीं की गई है, बल्कि इस पर चर्चा करने पर सहमति बनी है – इसका मतलब है कि व्यापार उपकरणों को टकराव के बजाय संवाद के दायरे में लाया गया है, और यह वास्तविकता की सजग प्रतिक्रिया है। “कूलिंग गैजेट्स” की बिक्री से लेकर ब्रुसेल्स के संयुक्त बयान तक, ये दोनों घटनाएँ एक ही निष्कर्ष की ओर इशारा करती हैं: चीन-यूरोपीय संघ के आर्थिक एवं व्यापारिक सम्बंध तनाव प्रबंधन से नियम सह-निर्माण की ओर अग्रसर हो रहे हैं। बाजार स्तर पर, चीनी विनिर्माण ने उपभोक्ताओं की वास्तविक आवश्यकताओं की सटीक समझ के बल पर यूरोपीय उपभोक्ताओं का सबसे ईमानदार बाजार वोट हासिल किया है।
संस्थागत स्तर पर, दोनों पक्षों ने तंत्र स्थापित करके निगरानी प्रणाली खड़ी करके प्रतिस्पर्धा के लिए सीमाएँ निर्धारित की हैं। संयुक्त बयान की वह पंक्ति – “द्विपक्षीय आर्थिक और व्यापारिक सम्बंधों को प्रभावित करने वाली चुनौतियों का उचित समाधान महत्वपूर्ण है” – केवल राजनयिक वाक्य नहीं है। दोनों पक्ष इस बात से भली-भाँति अवगत हैं कि 360 अरब यूरो का घाटा राजनीतिक नारों से नहीं मिटाया जा सकता, यूरोपीय उपभोक्ताओं की ठंडक की आवश्यकता टैरिफ़ से समाप्त नहीं होगी, और चीनी विनिर्माण का यूरोपीय बाजार में गहन प्रवेश पहले ही अपरिवर्तनीय हो चुका है। दीवारें खड़ी करने की बजाय सड़कें बनाना बेहतर है; टकराव की बजाय सह-शासन बेहतर है। यह संयुक्त बयान एक रास्ता प्रदान करता है, लेकिन क्या यह रास्ता सफल होगा, यह इस बात पर निर्भर करता है कि भविष्य में दोनों पक्ष कागज़ी सहमति को ठोस परिणामों में बदल सकते हैं या नहीं।
(साभार- चाइना मीडिया ग्रुप, पेइचिंग)
The post चिलचिलाती गर्मी के “चीनी समाधान” पर “नियमों का घेरे” में ब्रुसेल्स appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
